business-abstract.content:
# THE COMPLETE SALES BIBLE
## Sarah Chen | Unbound Leadership

---

## SECTION 1: TITLE (3 Variations)

**Urgent/ASAP Version:** "How to Run a 7-Figure Business from Self-Trust in 6 Months Without Working 70-Hour Weeks"

**Full/Complete Version:** "The Complete Guide to Sovereign Leadership for Female Founders Making $150K-$500K Who Feel Trapped by Their Own Success"

**Product/Method Version:** "The Sovereignty Stack: How Female Founders Are Breaking Revenue Ceilings and Reclaiming Their Lives Using Three-Layer Identity Integration"

---

## SECTION 2: THE HOOK

Are you a female founder age 30-45 running a service business making $150K-$500K who feels trapped by your own success, and you're sick and tired of working 70-hour weeks while charging half what your competitors charge?

And all you want is a faster, simpler, easier way to run a business from self-trust instead of self-abandonment?

In this guide, I'm going to show you how to transform from The Half-Price Hustler to The Sovereign CEO in the next 6 months without sacrificing your family or your sanity.

So you can get clarity on the root patterns keeping you stuck, develop a new default nervous system state, and create lived evidence of your new identity — and ultimately become The Sovereign CEO who runs her business from fullness, not depletion.

So if you are a female founder making good money on paper but working endless hours, you're undercharging because you feel guilty about premium prices, you can't delegate without micromanaging, and you're checking Slack at 10pm while your family asks why you're always working, leading to feeling resentful toward clients who demand endless revisions, exhausted but wired and unable to truly rest, invisible despite running a successful business, and lonely at the top with no one who understands your struggles...

You've tried reading business books obsessively, joining masterminds for networking and accountability, following mindset coaches on Instagram for inspiration, and working longer hours to "catch up," but you're still stuck at the same revenue plateau for 2-4 years while burning yourself out...

Then pay attention to what I'm about to share with you because this could very well be the guide that changes everything for you.

---

## SECTION 3: SOCIAL PROOF

Just like it did for Priya R. See, Priya was right where you are. She had a marketing agency making $180K but was completely burnt out and charging half of what her competitors charged, leading to working endless hours just to make ends meet and constantly second-guessing her prices, which made her feel resentful toward clients who didn't seem to appreciate her work, exhausted from overdelivering on every project, and trapped in a business that owned her instead of serving her. 

She had tried joining multiple masterminds, reading every business book she could find, and working with various business coaches who told her to "just charge more," but she still felt guilty every time she thought about raising her prices and couldn't break through her revenue ceiling no matter how hard she worked.

But she applied what I'm about to share with you through the 6-month Sovereign CEO program and ultimately ended up tripling her prices, dropping 70% of her clients, and reaching $420K per year with half the workload in just 7 months. And she didn't even have to work weekends anymore or feel guilty about charging what she's worth.

As Priya said: "I finally stopped feeling guilty for charging what I'm worth."

---

## SECTION 4: OVERVIEW

And in this guide, I'm going to share with you exactly what she did including:

1. **The #1 Truth about getting clarity on root patterns, developing nervous system regulation, and creating lived evidence of your new identity to ultimately become The Sovereign CEO** — that is the difference between staying stuck as The Half-Price Hustler and running a 7-figure business from self-trust of your dreams

2. **The Real Reason female founders making $150K-$500K struggle to break their revenue ceiling** and why no matter how many business books you read or masterminds you join, you'll never get sustainable success without addressing your internal operating system

3. **The exact three-phase process me and my clients used to transform from resentful high-achievers to sovereign leaders** and stop undercharging, overworking, and people-pleasing for good

---

## SECTION 5: BACKSTORY

My name is Sarah Chen and in the last 7 years, I've become ICF-certified, helped 180 one-on-one clients transform their businesses, and built Unbound Leadership to help female founders rewrite the inner narratives that keep them stuck below six figures.

I went from The Half-Price Hustler to The Sovereign CEO and I've helped dozens of others do the same.

But it wasn't easy...

At 33, I had a "successful" consulting business making $400K, but I was working 70-hour weeks, drinking to sleep, and silently resenting every client who asked for another revision. I had all the external markers of success but felt completely trapped by my own achievement.

I tried reading every business book, optimizing my systems, and pushing myself to work even harder, but no matter what I did, I still felt resentful, exhausted, and like I was abandoning myself to serve everyone else.

Then, my therapist asked me, "What would you do if you believed you were already enough?" I didn't have an answer, and that terrified me. That question shattered everything I thought I knew about success and worthiness.

So I spent 2 years in deep inner work, got ICF-certified in 2021, and pivoted the business to coaching women through the exact patterns I'd been stuck in. I launched my coaching business in 2022 and discovered how to help others transform their relationship with work, money, and self-worth.

I went from working 70-hour weeks while making $400K to working 30-40% fewer hours while helping others create sustainable success. I learned how to excavate hidden operating systems, integrate somatic and IFS practices, and embody new ways of being in business.

And I realized I was never going to have to deal with undercharging, overworking, or resentment toward my clients ever again.

Most importantly, I now had a way of getting clarity on root patterns, developing nervous system regulation, and creating lived evidence of transformation — ultimately becoming The Sovereign CEO.

And now it is my mission to help female founders rewrite the inner narratives that keep them stuck, because I believe that the hustle playbook is killing a generation of women entrepreneurs and no one is telling them the truth about why.

---

## SECTION 6: OLD IDENTITY → ASPIRING IDENTITY

The fact that you're reading this tells me something about you...

It's important for you to eliminate undercharging, overworking, and people-pleasing right now, today.

You believe it's worth investing time in learning how to run a business from self-trust instead of self-abandonment.

You believe it's worth investing money to get help breaking through your revenue ceiling.

You know what you've been trying isn't working and you know there must be a better way.

And I'm going to do my best to not let you down.

Because you and I both know that most female founders making $150K-$500K would rather be spending their time present with their families, pursuing hobbies they love, and feeling proud of the business they've built...

But most female founders making $150K-$500K have self-worth tied to productivity, nervous system dysregulation from chronic stress, and delegation paralysis from perfectionism.

Most female founders making $150K-$500K complain that they have no time for anything but client work, can't charge what they're worth, and are working weekends again.

Most female founders making $150K-$500K feel resentful, exhausted, invisible, and lonely at the top.

Most female founders making $150K-$500K have revenue plateaus despite working more hours, chronic burnout, and businesses that completely depend on their personal effort.

Most female founders making $150K-$500K never get to run a 7-figure business from self-trust.

You and I both know what most female founders making $150K-$500K are... they're The Half-Price Hustler.

But you're not like most female founders. You're not The Half-Price Hustler.

Because you're here. Reading this guide.

So that tells me you're an action taker like me and my other clients.

Action takers like us are relentlessly trying to figure out how to get clarity on root patterns, develop nervous system regulation, and create lived evidence of transformation without getting caught up in surface-level strategies or endless business book consumption.

We just want to run a business from self-trust instead of self-abandonment. And we ultimately want to become The Sovereign CEO.

---

## SECTION 7: CORE BELIEF SHIFT

Here's the #1 Truth about getting clarity on root patterns, developing nervous system regulation, and creating lived evidence of transformation to ultimately become The Sovereign CEO — that is the difference between staying stuck in revenue plateaus and running a 7-figure business from self-trust of your dreams.

It's like Stephen Covey's principle of "sharpening the saw" — taking time to renew yourself physically, mentally, emotionally, and spiritually actually increases your capacity to produce results rather than diminishing it. A car engine that runs at redline constantly will eventually blow up, no matter how high-quality the parts. But an engine that operates at optimal RPMs with regular maintenance will run for hundreds of thousands of miles. Your business needs you operating at sustainable capacity, not maximum effort.

See, most female founders believe "hustling harder and working more hours is the path to building a successful business," so they read more business books, join more masterminds, and work longer hours, and you've already proven that those don't work.

The truth is: The Sovereignty Stack — three-layer integration of IFS parts work, somatic regulation, and business operating systems — is the proven path to sustainable success.

The reason is that sustainable success comes from inner alignment, not external hustle. When you lead from self-trust and create systems that support your energy, your business thrives with less effort. You wake up naturally at 7am without an alarm, feeling rested. Your morning routine includes pottery or hiking before checking emails at 9am. When clients request changes, you respond from clarity rather than reactivity, often suggesting better solutions they hadn't considered.

And if you truly understand that sustainable success comes from operating from fullness rather than depletion, then you can apply The Sovereignty Stack that I'm going to share with you in just a second, and get permission to slow down, the ability to be seen for your true value, and the confidence to raise prices without guilt while feeling spacious, grounded, self-trusting, and proud.

And you'll never have to deal with undercharging, overworking, people-pleasing, feeling resentful toward clients, exhausted but unable to rest, invisible despite your success, or reading endless business books hoping for the magic strategy ever again.

Imagine getting clarity on the patterns that have been running your business decisions, developing a nervous system that stays calm under pressure, and having lived evidence that you can succeed from self-trust rather than self-abandonment...

How would that make you feel?

Well, when you understand that transformation happens at the identity and nervous system level, not just the strategic level, then you can run a 7-figure business from self-trust and become The Sovereign CEO.

Just like Priya, who went from $180K and burnt out to $420K with half the workload in 7 months.

---

## SECTION 8: THE REAL PROBLEM

You can read business books and join masterminds all day, but if you don't understand and apply what I'm about to share with you, you'll never run a business from self-trust instead of self-abandonment.

Here's why... Traditional business education addresses the mind, but transformation happens at the identity and nervous system level. Most programs give you strategies without addressing the internal patterns that prevent you from implementing them consistently.

It's like trying to plant a garden in contaminated soil. You can have the best seeds, perfect fertilizer, and ideal weather conditions, but if the soil is toxic, nothing will grow properly. The Sovereignty Stack cleans the soil first.

See, most female founders think "I need better marketing strategies and systems," so they consume more content, buy more courses, and implement more tactics, and you've already proven that those don't work.

The truth is: Your real problem is that your self-worth is tied to productivity, which creates patterns you can't see.

The reason is that your business challenges are symptoms of deeper identity patterns. When you address the root — your relationship with self-worth and productivity — the surface problems resolve naturally. Instead of frantically searching for new marketing tactics, you pause and ask, "What part of me believes I need to prove my worth through complexity?" You make business decisions from inner wisdom rather than external pressure.

Once I understood this, I went from The Half-Price Hustler working 70-hour weeks while making $400K but feeling trapped and resentful, to getting clarity on my root patterns, developing nervous system regulation, and creating lived evidence of my new identity — ultimately becoming The Sovereign CEO.

All in a matter of 2 years.

Once I understood this, I finally understood how to get permission to slow down, be seen for my true value, and raise prices without guilt, and why nothing I was doing was working.

And it ultimately led me to discovering The Sovereignty Stack — three-layer integration of IFS parts work, somatic regulation, and business operating systems.

---

## SECTION 9: THE 3-PHASE SOLUTION

Because knowing that sustainable success comes from inner alignment and that your self-worth patterns are the real problem is awesome, but knowing better is only half the battle. The other half is actually doing the correct steps to get clarity on root patterns, develop nervous system regulation, and create lived evidence of transformation. Because the truth is... if you don't have a proven system that gets those results... you'll never be a true Sovereign CEO. So that's why I developed The Sovereign CEO program.

**OVERVIEW:**
It's a hybrid program that helps female founders making $150K-$500K run a 7-figure business from self-trust without working 70-hour weeks or charging half what they're worth. This works by addressing identity and nervous system patterns first, then integrating practical business systems in a way that creates sustainable transformation. As a result... instead of reading business books and joining masterminds while staying stuck at the same revenue plateau... All you'll get are clarity on root patterns, nervous system regulation, and lived evidence of your new identity. 

With The Sovereign CEO, you can have less resentment and exhaustion, run a business from self-trust instead of self-abandonment, and feel spacious, grounded, self-trusting, and proud! And in this program, I'm going to give you the step-by-step system on how you can do it too. It's the exact same system me and my clients currently use to break revenue ceilings and reclaim their lives. And it's designed to help you go from The Half-Price Hustler to The Sovereign CEO.

**PHASE 1: EXCAVATE**
The first step is called Excavate.

The first thing we're going to do is uncover your hidden operating system and get clarity on the root patterns that have been driving your business decisions.

We do this by spending 4 weeks identifying the unconscious beliefs, nervous system responses, and identity patterns that keep you undercharging and overworking in a way that easily, quickly avoids surface-level symptom management and gets to the core of why you're stuck.

It's the same deep excavation work I used personally to discover that my self-worth was tied to productivity and that I was abandoning myself to serve others.

It's also the same exact process that all my clients use as well...

It includes weekly 1-on-1 sessions, targeted assessments, and parts mapping exercises designed to help you see the patterns you can't see from inside your own system so you can stop operating from unconscious programming.

And once that's done, you'll be one step closer to running a business from self-trust.

This way, you won't have to keep trying different strategies that don't address the root cause anymore and you won't have to feel confused about why you can't seem to break through your ceiling anymore.

And if you don't get clarity on your root patterns, you'll keep repeating the same cycles of overwork and resentment no matter what business tactics you try.

But getting clarity isn't enough.

If you want to run a 7-figure business from self-trust, you'll also need to develop a new default nervous system state...

**PHASE 2: INTEGRATE**
The second step is called Integrate.

Now we're going to rewire your nervous system and develop new default responses to business stress and client interactions.

We do this by spending 8 weeks practicing somatic regulation techniques and IFS self-leadership in a way that easily, quickly avoids willpower-based change attempts and creates lasting transformation at the body level.

It's the same integration work I used personally to shift from chronic fight-or-flight mode to being able to stay calm and grounded during challenging client conversations.

It's also the same exact process that all my clients use as well...

It includes guided somatic practices, parts dialogue sessions, and nervous system regulation tools designed to help you respond from Self rather than reactive parts so you can make decisions from inner wisdom instead of external pressure.

And once that's done, you'll be one step closer to running a business from self-trust.

This way, you won't have to rely on caffeine and willpower to manage your energy anymore and you won't have to feel anxious and overwhelmed by client demands anymore.

And if you don't develop nervous system regulation, you'll stay stuck in reactive patterns that sabotage your best intentions.

But integration isn't enough.

If you want to run a 7-figure business from self-trust, you'll also need to create lived evidence of your new identity...

**PHASE 3: EMBODY**
The third step is called Embody.

Now we're going to apply your new internal operating system to real business decisions and create evidence that you can succeed from self-trust.

We do this by spending 12 weeks implementing sovereignty frameworks in your actual business operations in a way that easily, quickly avoids theoretical understanding without practical application and gets you concrete proof of your transformation.

It's the same embodiment work I used personally to triple my confidence in pricing conversations and build systems that allowed me to take time off without business disruption.

It's also the same exact process that all my clients use as well...

It includes business decision frameworks, pricing psychology work, and boundary implementation strategies designed to help you operate from your new identity in real-world situations so you can have lived evidence that self-trust creates better results than self-abandonment.

And once that's done, you'll have successfully transformed from The Half-Price Hustler to The Sovereign CEO.

This way, you won't have to wonder if the inner work will translate to business results anymore and you won't have to feel like you're just doing therapy disguised as business coaching anymore.

And if you don't create lived evidence of your new identity, the old patterns will pull you back into familiar but limiting ways of operating.

---

## SECTION 10: DELIVERY & SUPPORT

And in case you need help along the way...

I'm giving you comprehensive support including weekly 1-on-1 sessions where we work on your specific patterns and challenges, monthly group calls where you can learn from other women going through the same transformation, and Voxer access between sessions so you can get real-time guidance when you're facing difficult decisions or client situations.

**Here's exactly what you get:**

- **Weekly 1-on-1 Sessions:** 60-minute deep-dive calls where we excavate your patterns, practice somatic regulation, and apply sovereignty frameworks to your real business situations
- **Monthly Group Calls:** Community sessions where you connect with other female founders and get additional coaching on common challenges
- **Voxer Access:** Voice message support between sessions for real-time guidance when you need it most
- **Private Circle Community:** Online space where you can share wins, ask questions, and support each other through the transformation
- **Quarterly Retreats:** In-person gatherings for deeper integration and community building
- **The Sovereignty Stack Frameworks:** Complete system of tools, assessments, and practices you can use long after the program ends

All delivered over 6 months with the option to pay in full or spread across 6 monthly payments, so you can focus on transformation instead of financial stress.

---

## SECTION 11: THE CLOSE

**RECAP:**
You now know:

1. **The #1 Truth about getting clarity on root patterns, developing nervous system regulation, and creating lived evidence of transformation** — that sustainable success comes from inner alignment, not external hustle, which is the difference between staying stuck in revenue plateaus and running a 7-figure business from self-trust of your dreams

2. **The Real Reason female founders making $150K-$500K struggle to break their revenue ceiling** and why reading business books and joining masterminds will never get you there because the real problem is self-worth tied to productivity, not lack of strategy

3. **The exact three-phase process me and my clients used to transform from The Half-Price Hustler to The Sovereign CEO** and stop undercharging, overworking, and people-pleasing for good

**WHY NOW:**
And if you're reading this, you:
- Know you can run a business from self-trust but you just can't seem to get clarity on your root patterns in a way that avoids staying stuck in the same cycles
- You're frustrated with surface-level strategies that don't work... and you just want to develop nervous system regulation already  
- You really want permission to slow down, to be seen for your true value, and to raise prices without guilt
- You're sick of seeing other coaches post about their effortless success while you're grinding for every dollar and you just want to create lived evidence of your new identity

If you had all of that right now, today... how much faster, simpler, easier would your life be?

Take a second to imagine, what would you be able to do? Take a month off without checking email? Charge premium prices with complete confidence? Make decisions from inner wisdom instead of external pressure? Have your family see you as present and calm instead of stressed and distracted?

Most female founders making $150K-$500K only dream of running a business from self-trust and becoming The Sovereign CEO. Very few actually achieve it.

**TWO OPTIONS:**
So the obvious question is, how can you apply The Sovereignty Stack and get clarity on root patterns, nervous system regulation, and lived evidence of transformation today?

Well, you basically have two options...

You can take what you've learned today and try to implement it all yourself, with nobody to guide you through the excavation process, support you during nervous system rewiring, or help you embody your new identity in real business situations... leaving you to figure out all the details yourself through trial and error... and hopefully, eventually, maybe you get results.

Or you can join The Sovereign CEO program and get the proven system that gets clarity on root patterns, nervous system regulation, and lived evidence of transformation...

Now, sadly, most female founders who read this will do nothing with this information. Most never succeed at this. And if you want to get the results that MOST have, do what MOST do. Do nothing. That's why most stay The Half-Price Hustler.

But if you want to be one of the rare few to know what it feels like to run a 7-figure business from self-trust and feel spacious, grounded, self-trusting, and proud...

Then I'd like to invite you to draw a line in the sand. Go all in.

Today could be the day the struggle stops for you. Today could be the day you become The Sovereign CEO.

**OBJECTION HANDLING:**

I know some of you are thinking, "This mindset work feels too woo for me." Listen, I get it. I used to think the same thing. But here's what I discovered: Bessel van der Kolk's research in "The Body Keeps the Score" demonstrates that lasting change requires addressing trauma and patterns stored in the nervous system, not just cognitive understanding. Business transformation works the same way — it needs to happen at the somatic level, not just the strategic level. This isn't woo-woo; it's neuroscience.

Others are thinking, "I need tactics, not therapy." Here's the thing — if your car keeps overheating, you could keep adding coolant every day, but until you fix the leak in the radiator, you'll never solve the real problem. Marketing tactics are like adding coolant — they might provide temporary relief, but they don't address the underlying issue causing the symptoms. You've already tried tactics. How's that working for you?

And I know some of you are saying, "I don't have time for another program." But here's what you need to understand: A professional athlete doesn't skip strength training because they need to practice their sport. They know that building core strength makes every other movement more powerful and prevents injury. Inner work is your core strength — it makes every business activity more effective and prevents burnout. The 20 minutes you spend on somatic practice each morning will save you hours of scattered, ineffective work later.

**INVESTMENT:**
The investment for The Sovereign CEO is $18,000 for the complete 6-month transformation, or you can choose 6 monthly payments of $3,200. And here's the thing — Priya R. initially hesitated about this investment, thinking she should spend that money on marketing instead. But within 7 months, she had tripled her prices and increased her revenue from $180K to $420K annually while cutting her workload in half. The program paid for itself 13 times over in the first year alone.

Plus, I'm so confident this will work for you that I offer a 60-day guarantee. If after 60 days you don't feel a meaningful shift in how you operate your business, I'll refund every penny.

---

## SECTION 12: THE DECISION

But now is the time to decide. This opportunity won't be around forever.

So, right now, ask yourself...

Do you want to be one of the many who struggle with undercharging, overworking, and feeling trapped by their own success?

Or do you want to be one of the few who run 7-figure businesses from self-trust, take months off without business disruption, and feel spacious, grounded, and proud of what they've built?

The choice is yours.

But I can only show you the door. You're the one who has to walk through it.

**Your next step is simple:** Click the link below to book a call with me. We'll spend 60 minutes getting clear on your specific patterns, what's really keeping you stuck, and whether The Sovereign CEO is the right fit for you. No pressure, no hard sell — just an honest conversation about your business and your life.

[BOOK YOUR CALL HERE]

Either way, thanks so much for reading and I wish you all the best.

But if you're ready to stop being The Half-Price Hustler and become The Sovereign CEO who runs her business from self-trust instead of self-abandonment...

I'll see you on the call.

---

*Sarah Chen*  
*Founder, Unbound Leadership*  
*ICF-Certified Coach*  
*Former Shopify Product Manager*  
*180+ Female Founders Transformed*

business-abstract.content:
# Client Filter: The Sovereign CEO Program

---

## THIS IS FOR YOU IF...

1. You're making $150K-$500K annually but working 70+ hour weeks and charging significantly less than your competitors because deep down, you don't believe you're worth premium prices.

2. You've already invested in masterminds and business books but find yourself unable to implement what you know because something inside you resists slowing down or raising your rates.

3. You're exhausted by client revision requests and scope creep but keep saying yes because you're terrified of disappointing people or losing business—even though you resent them for asking.

4. You recognize that your revenue plateau isn't a strategy problem but an identity problem, and you're willing to do uncomfortable inner work instead of just learning more tactics.

5. You have the financial resources to invest $18,000 in your transformation and can commit to 6 months of weekly calls, somatic practice, and implementing new boundaries with current clients.

6. You can already see yourself becoming The Sovereign CEO who runs her business from self-trust instead of self-abandonment, making decisions from inner wisdom rather than external pressure.

---

## THIS IS NOT FOR YOU IF...

1. You blame your revenue problems on market conditions, difficult clients, or bad luck rather than examining your own patterns around pricing, boundaries, and self-worth.

2. You believe that "good entrepreneurs sacrifice everything for success" and think taking time off or setting boundaries means you're not committed enough to your business.

3. You're looking for a quick fix or hoping someone will just tell you exactly what to post and when—you want tactics without having to address the internal patterns that keep you stuck.

4. You think mindset work is "too woo" and believe business problems should be solved with spreadsheets and strategies alone, not nervous system regulation and parts work.

5. You're just starting out (making less than $150K annually) or you're in a completely different industry where these specific patterns around service delivery and client boundaries don't apply.

6. You're comfortable staying as The Half-Price Hustler who proves her worth through endless work and aren't ready to face the uncomfortable truth that your business problems stem from how you relate to yourself.

---

**USAGE NOTES:** Place the "This is for you if..." section early on your sales page to help qualified prospects self-identify, and use individual bullets as social media posts or email subject lines. The "This is not for you if..." section works best on application forms or near the bottom of sales pages to prevent unqualified prospects from booking discovery calls. These filters will save you hours of conversations with people who aren't ready for this level of transformation.

# PRICING STRATEGY: THE SOVEREIGN CEO

## SECTION 1: RECOMMENDED PRICING STRUCTURE

**Pay-In-Full Option**
- **Price:** $18,000 for 6 months (or 6 monthly payments of $3,200)
- **Rationale:** This price point anchors against the transformation value — moving from The Half-Price Hustler who's trapped in 70-hour weeks to The Sovereign CEO who leads from fullness. At $18,000, you're positioning this as a premium business transformation, not just mindset coaching. The investment reflects the depth of the work (IFS + somatic + business systems) and the magnitude of the outcome (sustainable 7-figure growth without burnout).
- **Pay-In-Full Discount:** Pay in full: [COACH: Insert your real dollar amount here](save [COACH: Insert your real dollar amount here]— 10% off the $18,000 total)

**Payment Plan Option**
- **Recommended Structure:** 6 monthly payments of [COACH: Insert your real dollar amount here](total: $18,000)
- **Rationale:** This keeps each payment under the [COACH: Insert your real dollar amount here]"major purchase" threshold where most prospects need spousal approval or board meetings. At [COACH: Insert your real dollar amount here]/month, it feels like a significant but manageable business expense — comparable to what they're already losing monthly in underpricing.

**Which to Lead With and Why**
**Lead with the payment plan.** Here's why: Your ideal client is already financially stretched from undercharging and overworking. They have the revenue ($150K-$500K annually) but not the cash flow confidence. Leading with [COACH: Insert your real dollar amount here]/month feels like solving a cash flow problem, not creating one. Present it as: "6 monthly investments of [COACH: Insert your real dollar amount here]" then add "or save [COACH: Insert your real dollar amount here]by paying in full." This positions pay-in-full as the smart financial move for those who can swing it, while making the program accessible to cash-flow-conscious founders.

---

## SECTION 2: VALUE JUSTIFICATION (The Math That Sells)

**Current State:** $150K-$500K/year but working 70+ hour weeks
**Target Outcome:** $35K-$80K/month at the end of the program (up from $12K-$40K/month at intake), with 30-40% fewer working hours
**Cost of Staying Stuck:** ~$8,000/month in underpricing alone (charging half of competitors) plus 15-20 hours/week trapped in client work that should be delegated
**First Measurable Result:** by the end of week 4 — clients report their first real "permission to slow down" moment, usually a full day off without guilt
**Program Investment:** $18,000 for 6 months (or 6 monthly payments of $3,200)

**Value Reframe Statement:**
> "The real question isn't whether you can afford $18,000 for 6 months. It's whether you can afford ~$8,000/month in underpricing alone plus 15-20 hours/week trapped in client work that should be delegated. Clients in The Sovereign CEO see their first measurable result by the end of week 4 — their first real 'permission to slow down' moment — moving from $150K-$500K/year toward $35K-$80K/month with 30-40% fewer working hours. This program pays for itself in the first month just from pricing confidence alone."

**The 6-Month Math:**
- **Cost of waiting 6 months:** ~[COACH: Insert your real dollar amount here]in lost revenue from underpricing ($8,000 × 6 months)
- **Program investment:** $18,000
- **Net opportunity cost of NOT investing:** [COACH: Insert your real dollar amount here]+ in the first 6 months alone
- **Time reclaimed:** 90-120 hours (15-20 hours/week × 6 months) to reinvest in growth or life

---

## SECTION 3: GUARANTEE LANGUAGE

**Coach's Existing Guarantee:** If after 60 days you don't feel a meaningful shift, full refund.

**Analysis:** This is a solid balanced guarantee. It's results-focused ("meaningful shift") but subjective enough to protect you from unreasonable refund requests. The 60-day window gives clients enough time to complete Phase 1 (Excavate) and start Phase 2 (Integrate). **Recommendation: Keep it as-is** — it matches your confidence level and the nature of inner work.

**Version 1: THE BOLD GUARANTEE (Results-Based)**
> "Complete Phase 1 (Excavate) and Phase 2 (Integrate). If you haven't raised your prices by at least 25% or taken your first guilt-free day off within [COACH: Insert your real timeframe here], I'll refund your full investment and you keep everything."

*Use this when:* You have 10+ case studies of clients hitting pricing breakthroughs in the first [COACH: Insert your real timeframe here].

**Version 2: THE BALANCED GUARANTEE (Implementation-Based)**
> "Attend all weekly 1-on-1 sessions, complete the Sovereignty Stack exercises, and engage in the Circle community for 60 days. If you've done the work and don't feel a meaningful shift in how you relate to work and pricing, full refund."

*Use this when:* You want to ensure client commitment while still offering strong protection.

**Version 3: THE CONSERVATIVE GUARANTEE (Satisfaction-Based)**
> "Try The Sovereign CEO for 60 days. If it's not the right fit, email me and I'll refund your investment. No questions asked."

*Use this when:* You're launching to a new audience or testing new program elements.

---

## SECTION 4: SCARCITY & URGENCY OPTIONS

**3 Legitimate Scarcity Tactics**

**1. Coaching Capacity Limit**
*Why it's legitimate:* You genuinely can only handle 20 active clients with weekly 1-on-1s.
> "Limited to 20 active clients per cohort. When spots are full, there's a 3-month waitlist for the next opening."

**2. Quarterly Cohort Enrollment**
*Why it's legitimate:* The retreats happen quarterly, so enrollment needs to align.
> "The Sovereign CEO enrolls quarterly to align with our retreat schedule. Next cohort starts [DATE] — enrollment closes [DATE]."

**3. Founder-Only Exclusivity**
*Why it's legitimate:* The program is specifically designed for business owners, not employees.
> "Exclusively for female founders running their own businesses. No employees, no side-hustlers — only women who own the decisions that matter."

**3 Legitimate Urgency Tactics**

**1. Cost of Waiting (Using Coach Data)**
*Real reason:* Every month of delay costs real money.
> "Every month you wait costs you ~$8,000 in underpricing alone, plus 15-20 hours/week you'll never get back. Six months of waiting = [COACH: Insert your real dollar amount here]+ in lost opportunity."

**2. Q1 Business Planning Urgency**
*Real reason:* January-March is prime time for business transformation.
> "Start now and you'll have your new pricing and boundaries locked in before Q2. Wait until summer and you've lost half the year to old patterns."

**3. Retreat Bonus Deadline**
*Real reason:* Retreat planning requires advance notice.
> "Enroll by [DATE] and attend the next quarterly retreat at no extra charge — a [COACH: Insert your real dollar amount here]value. After [DATE], new clients wait for the following quarter."

**Recommended Fast-Action Bonus**
> "Enroll within 48 hours of this call and get a private 90-minute Sovereignty Intensive with me before your program starts — a [COACH: Insert your real dollar amount here]value, yours free. This session maps your specific patterns so we hit the ground running in week 1."

**Why this works:** It accelerates their transformation timeline and gives immediate value, making the fast decision feel smart rather than rushed.

business-abstract.content:
# THE BULLETPROOF SALES SCRIPT
## Sarah Chen | Unbound Leadership

*For qualified prospects who've consumed your lead magnet and are considering The Sovereign CEO program*

---

## SECTION 1: INTRODUCTION & RAPPORT (0:00-0:01)

"Hey [Name]! Good to see you. Thanks for making time for this call today."

[NOTE: Use their first name immediately. Warm, not overly enthusiastic.]

"Before we dive in, how's your day treating you? I know you're probably squeezing this between client calls."

[NOTE: Acknowledge they're busy — shows you understand their world. Keep this under 60 seconds total.]

"Perfect. Well, I'm excited to learn more about what's going on with your business and see if I can help."

---

## SECTION 2: FRAME SETTING (0:01-0:02)

"Here's how I like to do these calls — I'm going to ask you some questions to really understand where you are right now and what you're dealing with. Then, if I think I can genuinely help, I'll share what that would look like. If not, I'll point you in the right direction. Sound fair?"

[NOTE: Pause for agreement. This removes pressure and positions you as consultative, not pushy.]

"Cool. And listen — this isn't some pitch where I'm going to try to convince you of anything. I genuinely want to understand your situation first, because honestly? Not everyone is a fit for what I do."

[NOTE: This creates slight qualification pressure — they want to be "fit."]

"Alright, let's start with the real stuff..."

---

## SECTION 3: PROBLEM ISOLATION (0:02-0:03)

"So tell me — what's the biggest challenge you're facing with your business right now? What made you want to get on this call?"

[NOTE: CRITICAL — shut up and listen. Do not interrupt. Let them talk for 2-3 minutes if they need to.]

"And how long has this been going on?"

[NOTE: This question reveals whether it's acute or chronic pain. Chronic = higher urgency.]

---

## SECTION 4: PROBLEM UNDERSTANDING — DEEP PROBING (0:03-0:11)

**Chunking Questions:**

"When you say you're working too many hours, what does that actually look like day-to-day? Walk me through yesterday."

"You mentioned feeling trapped by your success — can you give me a specific example from this past week where that showed up?"

"What's this pattern costing you right now? In terms of time with your family, your own energy, maybe financially?"

**Consequence Questions:**

"How is this affecting your relationship with your partner? Your kids?"

"If nothing changes in the next 6 months — if you're still in this exact same cycle — where does that leave you?"

"What's the ripple effect here? It's not just about work, right?"

**Feeling Questions:**

"How does it feel when you're lying in bed at night thinking about tomorrow's client calls?"

"What's the worst part about this whole situation for you personally?"

"When you see other female founders posting about their 'effortless' success, what comes up for you?"

[NOTE: This is the most important section. Spend 8-10 minutes here. The more pain you uncover, the easier everything else becomes. Reference the Emotional Trigger Map — look for secret fears, hidden challenges, guilt/shame.]

**Follow-up probes based on their answers:**

"You said you feel resentful toward clients — tell me more about that."

"When you mentioned checking Slack at 10pm, what's going through your head in those moments?"

"You talked about feeling guilty for wanting to charge more — where do you think that comes from?"

---

## SECTION 5: DOUBT CREATION (0:11-0:12)

"So you've been trying to solve this by reading business books and joining masterminds... how's that been working for you?"

[NOTE: They'll usually laugh or say "obviously not great." That's your opening.]

"Right. Why do you think those approaches haven't moved the needle?"

"What do you think has been missing from everything you've tried so far?"

[NOTE: Listen for surface-level vs. root-cause language. They're starting to see their current approach isn't working.]

---

## SECTION 6: PAST SOLUTION ANALYSIS (0:12-0:15)

"What other programs, coaches, or courses have you invested in to try to fix this?"

"What worked? What didn't? Why do you think that was?"

"How much would you say you've spent trying to solve this problem over the past couple years?"

[NOTE: This reveals their investment history and inoculates against "I've tried coaching before."]

"What's different about your situation now compared to when you tried those things?"

"Looking back, what was missing from those experiences that might have made the difference?"

---

## SECTION 7: SUPPORT ASSESSMENT (0:15-0:17)

"Who's helping you with this right now? Do you have a coach, mentor, or community around these challenges?"

"How are you making decisions about pricing, boundaries, delegation — on your own or with guidance?"

"When you're stuck on something, who do you turn to?"

[NOTE: Most will say they're figuring it out alone. This sets up the need for expert guidance.]

---

## SECTION 8: DESIRE EXPLORATION (0:17-0:17)

"Okay, let's flip this. If we could wave a magic wand and this was all handled — what would your business and life look like 6 months from now?"

"Walk me through your ideal Tuesday. What time do you wake up? What does your day look like?"

"How would that feel compared to where you are now?"

"Who would you be as a leader if you weren't constantly fighting these patterns?"

[NOTE: Let them paint their own Heaven Island. Listen for Sovereign CEO language — self-trust, spaciousness, groundedness.]

---

## SECTION 9: WHY NOW / COST OF INACTION (0:17-0:21)

"Let me ask you something... You mentioned you've been dealing with this for [timeframe]. What has that already cost you?"

"I mean really — in terms of money left on the table, time you can't get back with your family, your own wellbeing?"

"And if nothing changes — if you're sitting here having this exact same conversation with someone else [COACH: Insert your real timeframe here] from now — what does that look like for you?"

"Is that acceptable?"

[NOTE: This should feel like holding up a mirror, not creating fake urgency. Reference their specific costs from earlier in the call.]

"You mentioned earlier that you're undercharging by about half of what your competitors charge. If that continues for another year, what's that actually costing you?"

---

## SECTION 10: CLARITY TIE-DOWN (0:21-0:23)

"Let me make sure I'm understanding you correctly..."

[Summarize back their problem, what they've tried, what's not working, what they want, and what's at stake]

"So you're making good money on paper but working 70-hour weeks, you're charging half what you're worth because of guilt, you've tried business books and masterminds but they don't address the root patterns, and you want to run your business from self-trust instead of constantly abandoning yourself to please everyone else. And if this doesn't change, you're looking at potential burnout, relationship strain, and staying stuck at this revenue ceiling indefinitely."

"Does that sound right? Did I miss anything important?"

[NOTE: If they say "yes, exactly" — you've built trust. If they correct you, adjust and re-confirm.]

---

## SECTION 11: DISCOVERY COMMITMENT (0:23-0:24)

"Based on everything you've shared, I actually think I can help. Would you like to hear how?"

[NOTE: They will almost always say yes. If they hesitate, that's a red flag about fit.]

"Cool. Let me walk you through exactly what I'd do if we worked together, because what you've described is exactly what I've built my program to solve."

---

## SECTION 12: TRANSITION TO PITCH (0:24-0:26)

"So here's what I've noticed from everything you've shared..."

"The reason the business books and masterminds haven't worked is because they're treating the symptoms — the surface-level strategies — but they're not addressing the root cause, which is that your self-worth is still tied to productivity and you're operating from patterns you can't see."

"It's like trying to plant a garden in contaminated soil. You can have the best seeds and perfect fertilizer, but if the soil is toxic, nothing grows properly."

"What I've built — The Sovereignty Stack — cleans the soil first. It addresses the identity and nervous system patterns that are driving all these surface-level problems."

"Here's how it works..."

---

## SECTION 13: THE PITCH — 3-PHASE SOLUTION (0:26-0:35)

"The Sovereign CEO is a 6-month program that takes you from where you are now — what I call The Half-Price Hustler — to becoming The Sovereign CEO who runs her business from self-trust instead of self-abandonment."

"It works in three phases:"

**"Phase 1: Excavate"**

"The first 4 weeks, we're going to uncover your hidden operating system. You mentioned feeling like you're stuck in patterns you can't see — this is where we make the unconscious conscious."

"We'll identify the specific beliefs, nervous system responses, and identity patterns that keep you undercharging and overworking. Remember when you said you feel guilty about raising prices? We'll find out exactly where that comes from and why it's running your business decisions."

"By the end of these 4 weeks, you'll have complete clarity on the root patterns that have been sabotaging you."

**"Phase 2: Integrate"**

"The next 8 weeks, we're rewiring your nervous system. You talked about feeling anxious during client conversations and checking Slack at 10pm — that's your nervous system in fight-or-flight mode."

"We'll use somatic regulation techniques and IFS self-leadership practices to literally change your default responses. Instead of reacting from that stressed, people-pleasing part, you'll learn to respond from what we call Self — that calm, grounded, confident leader inside you."

"This is where you develop the internal capacity to set boundaries, charge what you're worth, and make decisions from inner wisdom instead of external pressure."

**"Phase 3: Embody"**

"The final 12 weeks, we're applying everything to your real business. This isn't just therapy — we're implementing sovereignty frameworks in your actual operations."

"You'll practice having pricing conversations from your new identity, setting boundaries with difficult clients, and making business decisions from self-trust. You mentioned wanting to take a month off without everything falling apart — this is where we build the systems and internal capacity to make that possible."

"By the end, you'll have lived evidence that you can succeed from self-trust instead of self-abandonment. You'll be The Sovereign CEO."

[NOTE: Throughout the pitch, reference their specific words from discovery. "You mentioned X — Phase 2 directly addresses that."]

---

## SECTION 14: TEMPERATURE CHECK (0:36-0:39)

"So on a scale of 1 to 10, how does this feel so far?"

**If 8-10:** "What would make it a 10 for you?"

**If 6-7:** "What's holding you back from being more excited about this?"

**If 5 or below:** "Sounds like this might not be the right fit, and that's totally okay. What specifically doesn't resonate?"

[NOTE: The temperature check reveals hidden objections. Handle them before moving to close.]

---

## SECTION 15: TRANSITION TO CLOSE (0:39-0:40)

"Great. So would you like to hear what it looks like to get started?"

[NOTE: This asks permission to present offer details — not the close itself.]

---

## SECTION 16: DELIVERABLES & SUPPORT (0:40-0:41)

"Here's exactly what you get:"

"Weekly 1-on-1 sessions with me — these are 60-minute deep dives where we work on your specific patterns and apply everything to your real business situations."

"Monthly group calls with other women going through the same transformation — you'll realize you're not alone in this."

"Voxer access between sessions, so when you're facing a difficult client conversation or pricing decision, you can get real-time guidance."

"Access to our Private Circle community — these women become your lifelong support system."

"Quarterly retreats for deeper integration work."

"And all the frameworks, tools, and practices that make up The Sovereignty Stack."

"The whole thing is delivered over 6 months, and you'll never be stuck wondering what to do next."

"Any questions about how it works?"

---

## SECTION 17: INVESTMENT REVEAL (0:41-0:42)

"The investment for The Sovereign CEO is $18,000 for the complete 6-month transformation."

[NOTE: State the price and STOP TALKING. Do not fill the silence.]

"We also offer 6 monthly payments of $3,200 if that works better for your cash flow."

"And to put that in perspective — you mentioned you're probably undercharging by about $8,000 a month. This pays for itself in the first few months when you start charging what you're actually worth."

---

## SECTION 18: OBJECTION HANDLING

**"I need to think about it"**

"I totally understand. Can I ask — what specifically do you need to think about?"

[Wait for their answer]

"In my experience, 'I need to think about it' usually means there's a specific concern I haven't addressed yet. What is it?"

**"I can't afford it"**

"I hear you. Let me ask — is it that the money literally doesn't exist, or that you're not sure if it's worth the investment?"

*If literal:* "Would the payment plan make this possible for you?"

*If value:* "What would it be worth to you to go from working 70-hour weeks and feeling trapped to running a business from self-trust and taking months off without worry?"

**"I've tried coaching before and it didn't work"**

"What specifically didn't work about it?"

[Listen to their answer]

"That makes sense. The difference with The Sovereignty Stack is that we're addressing three layers — the parts work, the nervous system, and the business systems. Most coaching only hits one layer. What was missing before was [reference what they said]."

**"Mindset work feels too woo"**

"I get it — I used to think the same thing. But here's what I discovered: this isn't about crystals and affirmations. Bessel van der Kolk's research shows that lasting change happens at the nervous system level, not just the cognitive level. We're talking about neuroscience, not new age."

"You've already proven that strategy alone doesn't work. You know all the right tactics. The missing piece is addressing why you can't implement them consistently."

**"I need tactics, not therapy"**

"Here's the thing — you already know the tactics. You know you should charge more, set boundaries, delegate. The question is: why aren't you doing it?"

"It's like your car overheating. You could keep adding coolant every day, but until you fix the leak in the radiator, you'll never solve the real problem. The tactics are the coolant. The Sovereignty Stack fixes the radiator."

**"I don't have time for another program"**

"I understand. But let me ask you this — how much time are you spending right now being stuck in these patterns? Working 70-hour weeks, lying awake at night worrying, having the same conversations with difficult clients over and over?"

"This isn't about adding more to your plate. It's about changing how you operate so everything becomes more efficient. The 20 minutes you spend on somatic practice each morning will save you hours of scattered, reactive work later."

**"I need to talk to my husband"**

"Absolutely — it's important to be aligned on big decisions. What specifically do you think he'd want to know?"

"Would it help if I sent you a summary of everything we discussed that you could share with him?"

---

## SECTION 19: THE CLOSE (0:42+)

**If ready:**
"Awesome. Let me get you set up right now. I'm going to send you the enrollment link, and we'll get your first session scheduled this week."

**If needs time:**
"No pressure at all. I'll send you a summary of everything we discussed today. When would be a good time to follow up — tomorrow or Thursday?"

**If no:**
"I respect that decision. If anything changes, you know where to find me. In the meantime, I'd recommend starting with some basic boundary work — even small changes can make a difference."

[NOTE: Never beg, negotiate on price, or create fake urgency. Stay confident and outcome-independent.]

---

## SECTION 20: POST-CALL SUMMARY TEMPLATE

**Prospect name:** _______________

**Key problem identified:** _______________

**Current revenue/situation:** _______________

**What resonated most:** _______________

**Objections raised:** _______________

**Temperature check score:** ___/10

**Outcome:** 
□ Enrolled
□ Follow-up scheduled for: _______________
□ Not a fit because: _______________

**Follow-up notes:** _______________

---

### SCRIPT PRINCIPLES REMINDER

- **Discovery is everything:** Spend 50% of the call understanding their pain
- **Use their words:** Reference specific phrases they used throughout the pitch
- **Stay consultative:** You're diagnosing, not convincing
- **Handle objections with questions:** "What specifically concerns you about that?"
- **Never chase:** If they're not ready, that's okay
- **Confidence is contagious:** Believe in your solution completely

### VOICE REMINDER

Write in Sarah's authoritative voice: warm but direct, names uncomfortable truths, no toxic positivity. This should sound like a smart, caring professional having a real conversation — not a telemarketer reading a script.

business-abstract.content:
# HOMEPAGE COPY FOR UNBOUND LEADERSHIP

---

## 1. HERO SECTION

### Headline
**Stop Being The Half-Price Hustler. Become The Sovereign CEO Who Runs a 7-Figure Business from Self-Trust.**

### Subheadline
You're making $300K but checking Slack at 10pm. You're charging half what your competitors charge because raising prices feels "greedy." You're working 70-hour weeks but telling yourself you just need to be more disciplined. Here's what no one is telling you: this isn't a strategy problem. You're stuck because your nervous system is still running the show from a place of "I have to prove I'm worthy" instead of "I am inherently valuable."

### Primary CTA Button
**Book Your Sovereign CEO Strategy Call**

### Hero Image Suggestion
Professional female founder at her desk, looking calm and confident (not stressed or overwhelmed), with natural lighting suggesting spaciousness rather than the typical "hustle" imagery.

---

## 2. PROBLEM SECTION

### The Problem

**Making good money on paper but success feels like a prison you built with your own hands?**

You're not alone. Here's what I hear from female founders making $150K-$500K every single day:

• **"I have no time for anything but client work"** — You're answering emails during your daughter's soccer game and working weekends while your family asks why you're always on your phone

• **"I can't charge what I'm worth without feeling guilty"** — You're charging half what your competitors charge because deep down, you believe your worth is tied to how much you sacrifice

• **"I'm successful but miserable"** — You have 47 unread Slack messages at 10pm, you're drinking wine to sleep, and you silently resent every client who asks for another revision

• **"I can't delegate without micromanaging"** — Your business completely depends on your personal effort because you don't trust anyone else to maintain your standards

• **"I'm exhausted but can't slow down"** — You're trapped in a cycle where every revenue milestone comes with more hours, more stress, and less of yourself

**Sound familiar?**

You've tried reading business books obsessively, joining masterminds for accountability, and working longer hours to "catch up." But you're still stuck at the same revenue plateau for 2-4 years while burning yourself out.

Here's the uncomfortable truth: You're not stuck because you need better marketing or more willpower. You're stuck because your self-worth is still tied to productivity, and you're running your business from self-abandonment instead of self-trust.

---

## 3. SOLUTION SECTION

### The Sovereignty Stack

**What if I told you there's a way to run a 7-figure business from self-trust instead of self-abandonment?**

The Sovereignty Stack is a three-layer integration of IFS parts work, somatic regulation, and business operating systems that addresses the ROOT of why successful female founders stay stuck — your internal operating system.

Traditional business coaching gives you strategies without addressing the nervous system patterns that prevent you from implementing them. It's like trying to plant a garden in contaminated soil. You can have the best seeds and perfect fertilizer, but if the soil is toxic, nothing will grow properly.

**Here's how The Sovereign CEO program works:**

**PHASE 1: EXCAVATE (4 weeks)**
Uncover the hidden operating system that's been driving your business decisions. We identify the unconscious beliefs, nervous system responses, and identity patterns that keep you undercharging and overworking. You'll get clarity on the root patterns that have been running your life.

**PHASE 2: INTEGRATE (8 weeks)**
Rewire your nervous system through somatic regulation and IFS self-leadership practices. We create a new default state where you respond from Self rather than reactive parts. You'll develop the ability to stay calm and grounded during challenging client conversations.

**PHASE 3: EMBODY (12 weeks)**
Apply your new internal operating system to real business decisions. We implement sovereignty frameworks in your actual business operations so you have lived evidence that you can succeed from self-trust rather than self-abandonment.

**Why this works when everything else hasn't:** Most programs address the mind, but transformation happens at the identity and nervous system level. The Sovereignty Stack integrates all three layers — which is why it creates lasting change instead of temporary motivation.

---

## 4. RESULTS SECTION

### The Transformation

**From The Half-Price Hustler to The Sovereign CEO in 6 months.**

Instead of working 70-hour weeks while feeling resentful and exhausted, you'll run your business from fullness. You'll charge premium prices without guilt, take month-long vacations without checking email, and make decisions from inner wisdom rather than external pressure.

**Here's what becomes possible:**
- Making $35K-$80K per month (up from $12K-$40K) with 30-40% fewer working hours
- Taking full days off without guilt — your first real "permission to slow down" moment usually happens by week 4
- Charging premium prices while clients thank you for the transformation
- Having your team handle 80% of client work independently
- Sleeping 8 hours every night and waking up energized instead of anxious

**Real Results from Real Clients:**

*Priya R., marketing agency founder, was making $180K but completely burnt out and charging half of what her competitors charged. Through the 6-month Sovereign CEO program, she tripled her prices, dropped 70% of her clients, and reached $420K per year with half the workload in just 7 months.*

*"I finally stopped feeling guilty for charging what I'm worth."* — Priya R.

---

## 5. ABOUT SECTION

### Why I Do This Work

My name is Sarah Chen, and I help female founders rewrite the inner narratives that keep them stuck below six figures.

At 33, I had a "successful" consulting business making $400K, but I was working 70-hour weeks, drinking to sleep, and silently resenting every client who asked for another revision. When my therapist asked me, "What would you do if you believed you were already enough?" I didn't have an answer, and that terrified me.

I spent 2 years in deep inner work, got ICF-certified, and pivoted to coaching women through the exact patterns I'd been stuck in. In the last 7 years, I've helped 180 one-on-one clients transform their businesses and their relationship with success.

I created The Sovereign CEO because the hustle playbook is killing a generation of female founders, and no one is telling them the truth about why. You don't need another mastermind or business book. You need to address the root patterns that keep you trapped in cycles of self-abandonment.

---

## 6. "NOT FOR YOU IF..." SECTION

### This Is NOT For You If:

- **You're looking for quick tactics and aren't willing to do deep inner work** — This isn't about surface-level strategies or "mindset hacks"

- **You think mindset work is "too woo" and just want more marketing strategies** — If you believe success only comes from external tactics, this isn't your program

- **You're not ready to charge what you're actually worth** — We're going to challenge your relationship with money and value

- **You believe suffering and sacrifice are required for success** — If you're attached to the identity of "hustling harder," you'll resist this work

- **You want someone to coddle you instead of telling you the uncomfortable truth** — I don't do toxic positivity or gentle encouragement when you need direct feedback

If that's you, please don't apply. You'll waste your time and mine.

---

## 7. "THIS IS FOR YOU IF..." SECTION

### This IS For You If:

- **You're making $150K-$500K but feel like success is slowly killing you** — You know something has to change but you're not sure what

- **You're tired of charging half what your competitors charge out of guilt** — You're ready to own your value and price accordingly

- **You're ready to admit that working 70-hour weeks isn't a badge of honor** — You want success that enhances your life instead of consuming it

- **You know deep down that your self-worth shouldn't be tied to productivity** — You're willing to examine the patterns that keep you trapped

- **You're willing to do the uncomfortable work of changing your identity, not just your strategy** — You understand that real transformation requires going deeper than tactics

If that's you, then you're exactly who this program is designed for.

---

## 8. FINAL CTA SECTION

### Ready to Become The Sovereign CEO?

**Most female founders making $150K-$500K only dream of running a business from self-trust. Very few actually achieve it.**

You can keep trying to figure this out yourself — reading more books, joining more masterminds, working longer hours — and hopefully, eventually, maybe get results.

Or you can join The Sovereign CEO and get the proven system that addresses the root patterns keeping you stuck.

**The investment is $18,000 for 6 months, or 6 monthly payments of $3,200.**

Here's what you get: Weekly 1-on-1 sessions, monthly group calls, Voxer access between sessions, Private Circle community, and quarterly retreats. Plus, if after 60 days you don't feel a meaningful shift, I'll refund every penny.

But here's the thing — Priya's transformation paid for itself 13 times over in the first year alone. This isn't an expense; it's the highest-ROI investment you can make in your business.

**Your next step is simple:** Book a 60-minute strategy call with me. We'll get clear on your specific patterns, what's really keeping you stuck, and whether The Sovereign CEO is right for you. No pressure, no hard sell — just an honest conversation about your business and your life.

Today could be the day the struggle stops for you. Today could be the day you become The Sovereign CEO.

**Book Your Sovereign CEO Strategy Call**

*Either way, thanks for reading. But if you're ready to stop being The Half-Price Hustler and start running your business from self-trust instead of self-abandonment...*

*I'll see you on the call.*

---

**Sarah Chen**  
*Founder, Unbound Leadership*  
*ICF-Certified Coach*  
*180+ Female Founders Transformed*

business-abstract.content:
# About Sarah

Are you making $300K but still checking Slack at 10pm? The problem isn't your business strategy — it's that you're running your company from self-abandonment instead of self-trust.

---

## The Origin Story

At 33, I had what everyone called a "successful" consulting business. I was making $420K annually, had prestigious clients, and looked like I had it all figured out from the outside. But behind the scenes? I was working 70-hour weeks, drinking wine just to fall asleep, and silently resenting every client who asked for "just one more revision." 

I was The Half-Price Hustler — charging half what my competitors charged because deep down, I didn't believe I was worth more. I was trapped in a prison of my own making, where success felt like slow suffocation. My husband would ask why I was working on Sunday again, and I'd snap because I didn't have an answer that made sense.

Then my therapist asked me one question that shattered everything: "What would you do if you believed you were already enough?"

I sat there in complete silence. I didn't have an answer, and that terrified me more than any business challenge I'd ever faced. That question exposed the uncomfortable truth — I had built a business empire on the foundation of "I'm not enough yet."

So I did something that felt completely insane at the time. I spent 2 years in deep inner work. I got ICF-certified in 2021. I studied Internal Family Systems with Dr. Karen Hill. I learned somatic regulation. I pivoted my entire business model from consulting to coaching in 2022, helping other women through the exact patterns that had been slowly killing me.

The result? I went from working 70-hour weeks while making $400K but feeling trapped, to working 30-40% fewer hours while helping 180 clients transform their businesses from the inside out. I became The Sovereign CEO — someone who runs her business from self-trust instead of self-abandonment. My days feel spacious even though I'm making more money. I take month-long vacations without checking email. I make decisions from inner wisdom rather than external pressure.

And now? It's my mission to help female founders rewrite the inner narratives that keep them stuck below their potential, because the hustle playbook is killing a generation of women entrepreneurs and no one is telling them the truth about why.

---

## What I Believe

Here's what 7 years of coaching 180 female founders has taught me:

**The Sovereignty Stack is the only method that addresses identity and nervous system — everything else treats symptoms.** You can read every business book and join every mastermind, but if your nervous system is still running from "I have to prove I'm worthy," you'll keep hitting the same revenue ceiling. Traditional business education addresses the mind, but transformation happens at the identity and nervous system level.

**Your real problem isn't marketing — it's that your self-worth is tied to productivity.** Every time you undercharge, overdeliver, or work weekends, you're reinforcing the belief that your value comes from depletion. The 47 unread Slack messages at 10pm aren't a time management problem — they're a self-worth problem.

**Inner work isn't separate from business work — it's the foundation that makes everything else flow.** When you're internally aligned, you make better decisions, work more efficiently, and create better results in less time. The 20 minutes you spend on somatic practice each morning will save you hours of scattered, ineffective work later.

**Investing in your internal transformation is the highest-ROI decision you can make.** When you solve the root patterns keeping you stuck, every other business investment becomes more effective. Your internal operating system is your business transmission — when it's not working properly, no amount of marketing or team investment will create the results you want.

**You need expert guidance from someone who's walked this exact path.** You wouldn't try to perform surgery on yourself, even with access to all the medical textbooks. Some things require an outside expert who can see what you can't see and guide you through a proven process.

**The best time to address these patterns was 2 years ago — the next best time is now.** Every month you stay stuck in undercharging and overworking costs you thousands in lost revenue and years of your life you can't get back. Your family deserves the best version of you, not the leftovers.

---

## The Numbers

- **7 years** helping female founders transform their businesses
- **180 one-on-one clients** coached through identity-level transformation  
- **ICF-certified** with specialized training in Internal Family Systems
- **Former Shopify Product Manager** (2016-2019) who understands both corporate and entrepreneurial worlds
- **Built and scaled** a consulting practice from $0 to $420K before pivoting to coaching

Out of my last 40 clients in The Sovereign CEO program, 28 achieved breakthrough results — the first measurable wins usually show up by the end of week 4 when clients report their first real "permission to slow down" moment, usually a full day off without guilt.

---

## The Personal Side

When I'm not helping female founders rewrite their inner narratives, you'll find me at my pottery wheel in Toronto, hands covered in clay, creating something beautiful from raw earth. There's something about the process of centering clay that mirrors the work I do with clients — finding the still point in the chaos, applying gentle pressure to create form without force.

I hike the trails around Toronto with my border collie, who has taught me more about presence and boundaries than most business books ever could. And yes, I read tarot — not because I think the cards predict the future, but because they're incredible tools for accessing inner wisdom and seeing patterns we can't see from inside our own systems.

I live with my partner in a house filled with plants, books, and the kind of quiet that only comes when you've stopped running from yourself. My business supports my life now, instead of consuming it. That's what I want for every woman I work with.

---

## If This Resonates...

If you're a female founder making $150K-$500K who's tired of feeling trapped by your own success, if you're ready to stop being The Half-Price Hustler and become The Sovereign CEO who runs her business from self-trust instead of self-abandonment, then let's talk.

The Sovereign CEO program isn't for everyone. It's for women who are ready to do the uncomfortable work of changing their identity, not just their strategy. It's for founders who know that their current approach is slowly killing them and are willing to invest in transformation that goes deeper than tactics.

Ready to rewrite the inner narrative that's keeping you stuck?

**[Learn more about The Sovereign CEO →](https://unboundleadership.co/sovereign-ceo)**

---

*Because the world needs more women leading from fullness, not depletion.*
