business-abstract.content:
# WELCOME EMAIL SEQUENCE
## Sarah Chen | Unbound Leadership

---

## EMAIL 1: WELCOME + DELIVERY
**Send:** Immediately after opt-in  
**Purpose:** Deliver lead magnet, set expectations, build immediate trust

**Subject Line:** Your Sovereign CEO Audit is here (plus what's coming next)
**Alternative:** Welcome! Here's your audit + 7 uncomfortable truths

**Preview Text:** The assessment that reveals what's really keeping you stuck...

**Body Copy:**

You just downloaded The Sovereign CEO Audit, and I'm genuinely excited you're here.

Over the next week, you're going to get 6 emails from me that will challenge everything you think you know about building a sustainable business as a female founder.

No fluff. No toxic positivity. Just the uncomfortable truths that most business coaches won't tell you.

But first, here's something that might surprise you:

The fact that you're working 60+ hour weeks while making good money isn't a time management problem. It's not even a systems problem.

It's an identity problem.

See, most successful women are still operating from what I call "The Half-Price Hustler" — the part of you that believes your worth comes from how much you sacrifice.

And until you address that at the nervous system level, no amount of marketing tactics or productivity hacks will set you free.

Take the audit now while this is fresh. It'll take 10 minutes and reveal patterns you probably can't see from inside your own business.

Tomorrow, I'm going to share the story of how I went from making $400K while drinking myself to sleep every night to running a business that actually serves my life instead of consuming it.

It wasn't pretty. But it was necessary.

**CTA:** Complete your audit here: [LINK]

Talk soon,  
Sarah

**P.S.** Hit reply and let me know what you discover in the audit. I read every response.

---

## EMAIL 2: ORIGIN STORY → HELL ISLAND TO HEAVEN ISLAND
**Send:** Day 1-2  
**Purpose:** Build trust through vulnerability, mirror their Hell Island experience

**Subject Line:** The $400K prison I built for myself
**Alternative:** When success becomes your cage

**Preview Text:** I had everything I thought I wanted. So why was I miserable?

**Body Copy:**

At 33, I had what everyone called a "successful" consulting business.

$400K in revenue. High-profile clients. A waiting list.

I should have been celebrating.

Instead, I was working 70-hour weeks, checking Slack at 10pm, and drinking wine just to fall asleep because my mind wouldn't stop racing about client revisions.

I was resentful toward every client who asked for "just one more change." Exhausted but wired. Invisible to my own family because work consumed everything.

I had built a prison and called it success.

The breaking point came during a therapy session when my therapist asked: "What would you do if you believed you were already enough?"

I sat there in complete silence.

I had no answer. And that terrified me.

That question shattered everything I thought I knew about worthiness and achievement. I realized I was running my business from self-abandonment, not self-trust.

So I spent the next 2 years doing the deep inner work that no business coach had ever mentioned. IFS therapy. Somatic practices. Nervous system regulation.

I got ICF-certified and pivoted my entire business model.

Now? I work 30-40% fewer hours. I take month-long vacations without checking email. I charge premium prices without guilt. My business runs from alignment, not exhaustion.

I went from The Half-Price Hustler to what I now call The Sovereign CEO.

Here's what I want you to know: if you're reading this while feeling trapped by your own success, working endless hours despite making good money, or checking messages during family time...

You're not broken. You're not lazy. You're not "bad at boundaries."

You're just running the wrong operating system.

**CTA:** Hit reply and tell me: what would YOU do if you believed you were already enough?

Sarah

---

## EMAIL 3: CORE BELIEF #1 — YOUR CURRENT METHOD IS THE PROBLEM
**Send:** Day 3-4  
**Purpose:** Challenge their current approach, address "mindset work feels too woo"

**Subject Line:** Why every business book keeps you stuck
**Alternative:** The strategy trap that's killing female founders

**Preview Text:** It's not what you're learning. It's what you're not addressing.

**Body Copy:**

You've read the business books. Joined the masterminds. Followed the mindset coaches on Instagram.

You know more about funnels, frameworks, and "scaling strategies" than 90% of entrepreneurs.

So why are you still stuck at the same revenue plateau, working weekends, and charging half what your competitors charge?

Here's the uncomfortable truth: you're treating a nervous system problem with strategy solutions.

It's like trying to fix a broken foundation by repainting the walls. The house looks better temporarily, but it's still going to collapse.

Most business education addresses the mind. But transformation happens at the identity and nervous system level.

When your self-worth is tied to productivity, when your nervous system is stuck in fight-or-flight, when you're operating from parts of yourself that believe "I have to prove I'm worthy" — no marketing tactic will set you free.

This isn't "woo-woo" nonsense. This is neuroscience.

Bessel van der Kolk's research shows that lasting change requires addressing patterns stored in the nervous system, not just cognitive understanding.

Your business challenges aren't strategy problems. They're somatic problems.

That's why I developed The Sovereignty Stack — a three-layer integration of IFS parts work, somatic regulation, and business operating systems.

Because you can't think your way out of patterns that live in your body.

You have to feel your way through them.

**CTA:** Reply and tell me: what business strategy have you tried that worked temporarily but didn't stick?

Sarah

**P.S.** Tomorrow I'm going to show you what the REAL problem is (hint: it's not what you think).

---

## EMAIL 4: CORE BELIEF #2 — THE REAL PROBLEM IS NOT WHAT YOU THINK
**Send:** Day 5-6  
**Purpose:** Redefine the real problem, introduce The Sovereignty Stack

**Subject Line:** Your real problem isn't marketing (it's this)
**Alternative:** Why you're solving the wrong problem

**Preview Text:** Every strategy fails when you're fighting the wrong battle...

**Body Copy:**

"I just need better marketing strategies and systems."

I hear this from every female founder who comes to me stuck at $200K-$500K.

They think they need better funnels. More sophisticated automation. A different lead magnet.

But here's what I discovered after working with 180 clients:

Your marketing isn't the problem. Your self-worth patterns are.

When you believe deep down that you have to prove your value through endless work...

When your nervous system goes into panic mode every time you think about raising prices...

When you're operating from a part of yourself that equates rest with laziness...

No marketing strategy will save you.

You'll sabotage every system you build.

It's like having a leak in your radiator and just adding more coolant every day. You're treating the symptom, not the cause.

The real problem? Your identity is still running on the old operating system: "I am what I produce."

Until you address that at the root level, you'll keep:
- Undercharging because premium prices feel "greedy"
- Overdelivering to prove your worth
- Working weekends because rest feels irresponsible
- Checking Slack at 10pm because you can't truly disconnect

That's why I created The Sovereignty Stack.

**Phase 1: Excavate** — 4 weeks uncovering the hidden operating system that's been running your business decisions

**Phase 2: Integrate** — 8 weeks of somatic and IFS practice to rewire your nervous system's default responses

**Phase 3: Embody** — 12 weeks applying your new identity to real business decisions and creating lived evidence of transformation

This isn't therapy disguised as business coaching. This is business transformation that actually addresses the root cause.

**CTA:** Hit reply and tell me: what pattern do you keep repeating in your business, no matter how many strategies you try?

Sarah

---

## EMAIL 5: CORE BELIEF #5 — WHY THIS APPROACH WORKS
**Send:** Day 7-8  
**Purpose:** Provide proof, address "I don't have time for another program"

**Subject Line:** The 4-week breakthrough that changes everything
**Alternative:** Why Priya tripled her prices in 7 months

**Preview Text:** Real results from a real client who was exactly where you are...

**Body Copy:**

Priya R. was skeptical when she first heard about The Sovereignty Stack.

She ran a marketing agency making $180K but was completely burnt out. Working 70-hour weeks. Charging half what her competitors charged.

"I don't have time for inner work," she told me. "I need tactics, not therapy."

Sound familiar?

But here's what happened when she committed to the full process:

By the end of week 4 — the Excavate phase — she had her first real "permission to slow down" moment. A full day off without guilt.

That might not sound revolutionary to you, but for Priya, it was everything. She hadn't taken a guilt-free day off in 3 years.

8 weeks later, after the Integration phase, she was responding to client demands from clarity instead of reactivity. Her nervous system had learned a new default setting.

By month 7, she had tripled her prices, dropped 70% of her clients, and was making $420K annually with half the workload.

"I finally stopped feeling guilty for charging what I'm worth," she said.

The difference wasn't a new marketing strategy. It was a new operating system.

See, most programs give you tactics without addressing the internal resistance that prevents you from implementing them.

The Sovereignty Stack works because it integrates all three layers: parts work (identity), somatic regulation (nervous system), and business operating systems (practical application).

When you address transformation at the root level, everything else becomes easier.

You don't need more time for another program. You need a program that gives you back your time.

**CTA:** Ready to see what's possible for you? Hit reply and tell me what your first "permission to slow down" moment would look like.

Sarah

**P.S.** Tomorrow, I'm going to show you the real cost of staying stuck. It's higher than you think.

---

## EMAIL 6: CORE BELIEF #4 — THE COST OF INACTION + INVESTMENT REFRAME
**Send:** Day 9-10  
**Purpose:** Create urgency through cost of inaction, reframe investment

**Subject Line:** The [COACH: Insert your real dollar amount here]mistake you're making every year
**Alternative:** What staying stuck is really costing you

**Preview Text:** Spoiler: it's not just money. It's your life.

**Body Copy:**

Let's talk about what doing nothing is really costing you.

I'm not just talking about the ~$8,000/month you're losing by undercharging (charging half of what your competitors charge).

That's [COACH: Insert your real dollar amount here]per year. But that's just the beginning.

There's also the 15-20 hours per week you're trapped in client work that should be delegated. That's 780-1,040 hours annually — the equivalent of 6 months of full-time work.

But the real cost isn't financial. It's everything else:

Your daughter asking why you're always on your phone. Your partner wondering why you work on Sundays. The 47 unread Slack messages at 10pm that make your chest tight.

The slow erosion of who you used to be before you became a business owner.

The growing resentment toward clients who "don't appreciate" how much you sacrifice for them.

The exhaustion that wine can't fix and vacation can't cure because it follows you everywhere.

Here's what I know: a year from now, you'll either be running a business from self-trust, taking months off without checking email, and charging premium prices with complete confidence...

Or you'll be exactly where you are now, just more tired and more resentful.

The Sovereign CEO program is $18,000 for 6 months, or 6 monthly payments of $3,200.

That might feel like a lot. But staying stuck costs you [COACH: Insert your real dollar amount here]per year in underpricing alone, plus your health, your relationships, and your sanity.

Priya made back her entire investment within 4 months just from raising her prices. The program paid for itself 13 times over in the first year.

But more importantly, she got her life back.

**CTA:** If you're ready to stop paying the price of staying stuck, let's talk. Book a call here: [LINK]

Sarah

**P.S.** I offer a 60-day guarantee. If you don't feel a meaningful shift in how you operate your business, I'll refund every penny. The only risk is staying where you are.

---

There are two types of female founders making $150K-$500K:

**The Half-Price Hustler** — She's making good money on paper but working 70-hour weeks, drinking wine to sleep, and silently resenting every client revision request. She charges half what her competitors do because deep down, she doesn't believe she's worth more. Success feels like a prison she built herself.

She charges premium prices without guilt, takes month-long vacations without checking email, and makes decisions from inner wisdom rather than external pressure.

The difference isn't talent, luck, or market conditions.

It's operating system.

The Sovereign CEO program transforms you from The Half-Price Hustler to The Sovereign CEO in 6 months through The Sovereignty Stack — three-layer integration of IFS parts work, somatic regulation, and business operating systems.

**Here's exactly what you get:**

- **Weekly 1-on-1 Sessions:** 60-minute deep-dive calls where we excavate your patterns, practice somatic regulation, and apply sovereignty frameworks to your real business situations

No pressure. No hard sell. Just an honest conversation about your business and your life.

Sarah

# CONTENT PLAYBOOK: UNBOUND LEADERSHIP
## 98+ Content Angles for Female Founder Transformation

---

## SECTION 1: MIDDLE OF FUNNEL (MOF) — 93+ Angles

### A. Identity & Mindset (13 angles)

| # | Hook (first line) | Target Belief (1-6) | Evidence Type | Format | Brief Outline (2-3 sentences) |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | Your clients are a mirror of your standards — if they're demanding endless revisions and paying late, look in the mirror. | 1 | Universal Analogy | Carousel | You attract clients who match your internal operating system. If you don't value your own time, they won't either. Show how to shift standards to attract premium clients. |
| 2 | If you hesitate on investments in your business, your clients will hesitate on investing with you. | 5 | Cross-Domain Reference | Reel | Sales behavior is contagious — your relationship with money shows up in every client interaction. When you invest confidently, clients follow suit. Share the energetic shift that happens when you stop being cheap with yourself. |
| 3 | How you spend money signals who you are becoming — broke people buy courses, rich people hire experts. | 4 | Authority Reference | Post | Investment decisions reveal identity. Warren Buffett's principle about investing in yourself creates compound returns. Contrast course-hopping with strategic expert guidance. |
| 4 | You become who you surround yourself with — if your mastermind is full of struggling six-figure founders, guess what you'll stay? | 1 | Universal Story | Story | Excellence and mediocrity are both contagious. Share story of leaving comfortable peer groups for higher-level environments. The discomfort of being the "smallest" in the room accelerates growth. |
| 5 | Confused people don't buy — if you can't explain your transformation in one sentence, neither can your clients. | 2 | Personal Story | Reel | Communication clarity directly impacts sales results. Walk through how simplifying your message from complex coaching jargon to "I help female founders run businesses from self-trust" changed everything. |
| 6 | Millionaire female founders track their revenue per hour daily — six-figure founders track Netflix episodes. | 1 | Internal Case Study | Carousel | Show the specific daily habits that separate sovereign CEOs from hustling founders. Contrast time tracking, decision speed, and priority focus between the two identities. |
| 7 | Your relationship with money is running your business — if you feel guilty charging premium prices, your clients feel it too. | 2 | Client Case Study | Post | Money mindset shows up in every business decision. Reference Priya's transformation from guilt around pricing to confident premium positioning. The inner shift preceded the revenue shift. |
| 8 | How you spend your mornings reveals who you really are — reactive founders check email first, sovereign CEOs check in with themselves first. | 3 | Universal Analogy | Story | Time allocation reflects true priorities. Contrast the scattered energy of email-first mornings with the grounded clarity of self-care-first mornings. Show the business impact of this simple shift. |
| 9 | Fast decisions separate millionaire founders from everyone else — while you're "thinking about it," they're already implementing. | 1 | Authority Reference | Reel | Decision speed correlates with success. Reference research on high performers and quick decision-making. Show how overthinking is actually a form of self-sabotage disguised as prudence. |
| 10 | You can't hit a target you can't see — vague goals create vague results. | 1 | Universal Analogy | Carousel | Vision clarity determines outcome quality. Break down the difference between "I want more money" and "I want to make $80K/month helping 20 female founders transform their pricing psychology." |
| 11 | Becoming The Sovereign CEO requires killing The Half-Price Hustler — you can't transform by adding to who you already are. | 1 | Personal Story | Story | Identity transformation requires letting go, not just adding on. Share the uncomfortable process of releasing the hustling identity that felt safe but kept you stuck. True change is subtractive. |
| 12 | Comfort is the enemy of progress — if your business feels easy, you're not growing. | 1 | Universal Analogy | Post | Growth requires discomfort. Use fitness analogy about muscle growth requiring resistance. Show how business comfort zones create revenue plateaus and how strategic discomfort accelerates results. |
| 13 | The speed of your decisions reveals the speed of your growth — millionaires decide in minutes what broke people take months on. | 1 | Cross-Domain Reference | Reel | Decision speed reflects internal clarity and confidence. Contrast the analysis paralysis of scarcity mindset with the quick clarity of abundance mindset. Indecision is a luxury successful people can't afford. |

### B. The Real Problem (11 angles)

| # | Hook (first line) | Target Belief (1-6) | Evidence Type | Format | Brief Outline (2-3 sentences) |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 14 | You don't have a pricing problem — you have a self-worth problem disguised as a pricing problem. | 2 | Universal Analogy | Carousel | Most founders think they need better pricing strategies when the real issue is internal worth programming. Like treating a fever without addressing the infection — surface symptoms vs. root cause. |
| 15 | Your business isn't broken because you don't know what to do — it's broken because you're making feeling-driven decisions. | 2 | Personal Story | Story | Break down how emotional decision-making creates business chaos. Share specific examples of decisions made from fear, guilt, or people-pleasing that created revenue plateaus and client problems. |
| 16 | Every business coach told you to "just charge more" but none of them addressed why you can't — that's why you're still stuck. | 2 | Client Case Study | Post | Past coaching failures happened because they treated symptoms, not root patterns. Reference how traditional business advice fails when nervous system and identity patterns aren't addressed first. |
| 17 | Before you can scale your business, you need to scale your nervous system — chaos can't create calm. | 2 | Authority Reference | Reel | Nervous system capacity determines business capacity. Reference trauma research about how dysregulation affects decision-making. You can't build sustainable systems from an unsustainable internal state. |
| 18 | Here's your brutal reality check: You're making $300K but working 70-hour weeks because you're afraid of what happens if you stop. | 2 | Universal Story | Story | Paint the picture of their current world without judgment but with complete honesty. The success trap of being afraid to change what got you here because you don't trust what could get you there. |
| 19 | Every month you stay stuck costs you ~$8,000/month in underpricing alone (charging half of competitors) plus 15-20 hours/week trapped in client work that should be delegated. | 2 | Internal Case Study | Carousel | Break down the real financial and time cost of inaction. Show how the monthly cost of staying stuck exceeds the investment in transformation. Make the invisible costs visible and urgent. |
| 20 | Your pricing problem creates your time problem, which creates your energy problem, which creates your relationship problem — it's all connected. | 2 | Universal Analogy | Post | Show how one unaddressed pattern cascades into multiple life areas. Like a crack in a foundation affecting every floor of the house. Address the root or keep patching symptoms forever. |
| 21 | You're chasing revenue when you should be chasing sovereignty — money without freedom is just a prettier prison. | 2 | Personal Story | Reel | Goal correction around what success actually means. Share the realization that $400K with 70-hour weeks isn't success — it's self-abandonment with a good salary. |
| 22 | Ask yourself: "What would I do if I believed I was already enough?" — if you don't have an immediate answer, that's your problem. | 2 | Personal Story | Story | Use the therapist question that changed everything. Self-inquiry that reveals the gap between intellectual knowing and embodied believing. Most founders can't answer because they've never operated from enoughness. |
| 23 | You've been stuck at the same revenue plateau for 2-4 years — that's not a strategy problem, that's an identity problem. | 2 | Universal Analogy | Post | Time duration reveals the real issue. If strategies worked, the problem would be solved by now. Long-term stuckness indicates deeper patterns that surface tactics can't touch. |
| 24 | The real price of "I'll start Monday" — while you're procrastinating, your competitors are installing the systems that will make you irrelevant. | 2 | Universal Story | Carousel | Procrastination consequences in a competitive market. Every day of delay is a day of competitive advantage lost. Show the compound effect of small daily actions vs. waiting for perfect timing. |

### C. The Solution (17 angles)

| # | Hook (first line) | Target Belief (1-6) | Evidence Type | Format | Brief Outline (2-3 sentences) |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 25 | Old way: Work harder and longer. New way: The Sovereignty Stack — integrate your parts, regulate your nervous system, align your business operations. | 5 | Methodology Comparison | Carousel | Contrast the hustle approach with the integrated transformation approach. Show why three-layer integration (IFS, somatic, business systems) creates lasting change while tactics create temporary fixes. |
| 26 | I discovered The Sovereignty Stack when my therapist asked, "What would you do if you believed you were already enough?" and I had no answer. | 5 | Discovery Narrative | Story | Share the origin story of how the methodology was born from personal necessity. The 2-year journey from question to framework to helping 180 clients transform their businesses. |
| 27 | The biggest lie in female founder coaching: "You just need better boundaries" — boundaries without nervous system regulation are just suggestions. | 5 | Myth Debunking | Post | Debunk the surface-level boundary advice that doesn't work. True boundaries require internal capacity to hold them, which requires nervous system work, not just communication scripts. |
| 28 | The trap keeping female founders stuck: trying to solve identity problems with strategy solutions. | 5 | Trap Identification | Reel | Identify the category error that keeps smart women spinning. You can't think your way out of patterns that live in your body and nervous system. Strategy is the last step, not the first. |
| 29 | What the coaching industry doesn't want you to know: transformation happens in your nervous system, not your mind. | 5 | Deception Exposure | Carousel | Expose why traditional business coaching fails. Most programs address the cognitive level while change happens at the somatic level. The body keeps the score, and the body holds the patterns. |
| 30 | Most people think mindset work is about positive thinking — it's actually about parts integration and nervous system regulation. | 5 | Common Misunderstanding | Post | Correct the misconception about what real inner work entails. It's not affirmations and visualization — it's sophisticated psychological and somatic practices with measurable outcomes. |

| 8 | Your business isn't broken because you don't know what to do — it's broken because you're making feeling-driven decisions. | 2 |
| 9 | The 20-minute morning practice that doubled my revenue: somatic regulation before email checking. | 3 |
| 10 | Cheap programs produce cheap results — if you want premium transformation, invest at a premium level. | 4 |
| 11 | Most people think mindset work is positive thinking — it's actually nervous system regulation and parts integration. | 5 |
| 12 | I don't work with people who want quick fixes — this transformation requires courage and commitment. | 6 |
| 13 | Fast decisions separate millionaire founders from everyone else — while you're thinking, they're implementing. | 1 |
| 14 | You're chasing revenue when you should be chasing sovereignty — money without freedom is just a prettier prison. | 2 |
| 15 | Inner work isn't separate from business work — it's the foundation that makes everything else flow. | 3 |
| 16 | Finding the money is part of the transformation — resourceful people find a way, victims find an excuse. | 4 |
| 17 | Old way: Work harder. New way: The Sovereignty Stack — integrate parts, regulate nervous system, align operations. | 5 |
| 18 | My goal is to make you NOT need me — I teach you to fish, I don't fish for you. | 6 |
| 19 | If you hesitate on investments, your clients will hesitate on investing with you — energy is contagious. | 1 |
| 20 | The trap keeping female founders stuck: trying to solve identity problems with strategy solutions. | 2 |

---

## SECTION 5: 4-WEEK CONTENT CALENDAR

Each piece serves the specific purpose of building trust, challenging limiting beliefs, and creating desire for transformation through The Sovereignty Stack methodology.*

business-abstract.content:
# GHL CHAT/SMS AUTOMATION SEQUENCE
## Sarah Chen | Unbound Leadership | The Sovereign CEO

---

#### STEP 1: Initial Keyword Response

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact sends DM with keyword "SOVEREIGN" or "AUDIT"

**Time Delay:** None

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF keyword received: → Continue to Step 2
> - IF no keyword: → End sequence

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: lead-source-instagram] | [+Add: interested-sovereign-ceo]
**Pipeline Stage:** [Move to: New Lead]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Hey! I saw you're interested in breaking through that revenue ceiling that's been keeping you stuck.

Quick question - are you a female founder making $150K-$500K but working 70+ hour weeks and charging way less than you're worth?

Because if that's you, I've got something that could change everything.

Most women at your level think they need better marketing or more systems. But here's the uncomfortable truth: you're not stuck because of strategy. You're stuck because your self-worth is still tied to how much you sacrifice.

I just released The Sovereign CEO Audit - it'll show you exactly which patterns are keeping you trapped in the "hustle harder" cycle.

Want the link?

---

#### STEP 2: Audit Delivery + Qualification Start

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact replies with positive response (YES, SURE, SEND IT, etc.)

**Time Delay:** None

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF positive response: → Continue to Step 3
> - IF negative/unclear: → Go to Step 15 (Nurture sequence)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: requested-audit]
**Pipeline Stage:** [Move to: Engaged Lead]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Perfect! Here's your Sovereign CEO Audit: https://unboundleadership.co/audit

This will take about 8 minutes and show you exactly which internal patterns are sabotaging your business growth.

While you're taking that, I'm curious - what's the biggest frustration you're dealing with right now in your business?

Is it:
A) Working endless hours but can't seem to delegate
B) Undercharging because raising prices feels "greedy" 
C) Checking Slack at 10pm while your family asks why you're always working
D) All of the above (and you're exhausted just thinking about it)

---

#### STEP 3: Qualification Question 1 - Current Revenue

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact replies to frustration question

**Time Delay:** None

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF any response received: → Continue to Step 4
> - IF no response after 24 hours: → Go to Step 16 (Follow-up)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: answered-q1]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

I hear you. That cycle is exhausting and it's exactly what I help women break free from.

Here's what I've learned after helping 180 female founders: the problem isn't your work ethic or your business model. It's that you're running your company from self-abandonment instead of self-trust.

Quick question - what's your current monthly revenue range?
A) $12K-[COACH: Insert your real dollar amount here]/month
B) [COACH: Insert your real dollar amount here]-$40K/month  
C) $40K+/month

This helps me understand where you are in your journey.

---

#### STEP 4: Qualification Question 2 - Time Investment

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact replies with revenue range

**Time Delay:** None

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF A or B: → Continue to Step 5
> - IF C: → Continue to Step 5 (but tag as high-revenue)
> - IF no response after 12 hours: → Go to Step 17 (Follow-up)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: revenue-qualified] | [+Add: revenue-tier-A/B/C based on answer]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Got it. And here's the thing - I bet you're making decent money on paper but it's costing you everything else, right?

The women I work with are typically spending 15-20 hours per week trapped in client work that should be delegated, plus losing about $8,000/month in underpricing alone.

If I could show you how to run your business from self-trust instead of self-abandonment - meaning you could take a full month off without everything falling apart - how much would that be worth to you?

And honestly, are you someone who's ready to invest in transformation, or are you still in research mode?

---

#### STEP 5: Qualification Question 3 - Investment Readiness

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact replies about investment readiness

**Time Delay:** None

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF indicates ready to invest: → Continue to Step 6
> - IF still researching: → Go to Step 18 (Nurture/Education)
> - IF price objection: → Go to Step 19 (Price objection handling)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: investment-ready] or [+Add: still-researching]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

I appreciate the honesty. Here's what I know about women like you - you're not afraid of hard work. You've already proven you can build something successful.

The question is: are you ready to do the INNER work that actually creates sustainable success?

Because what I'm about to share isn't another business strategy. It's a complete identity transformation from The Half-Price Hustler to The Sovereign CEO.

My client Priya was making $180K but burnt out and charging half her competitors. After working with me for 7 months, she tripled her prices and hit $420K with half the workload.

But it required her to face some uncomfortable truths about why she was undercharging in the first place.

Are you ready for that level of honesty with yourself?

---

#### STEP 6: Program Introduction

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact indicates readiness for inner work/transformation

**Time Delay:** None

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF positive response: → Continue to Step 7
> - IF hesitation: → Go to Step 20 (Address hesitation)
> - IF no response after 24 hours: → Go to Step 21 (Follow-up)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: transformation-ready]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Good. Because here's what most coaches won't tell you:

You can read every business book, join every mastermind, and optimize every funnel... but if your nervous system is still running from "I have to prove I'm worthy," you'll stay stuck.

That's why I created The Sovereign CEO - a 6-month program that addresses the ROOT of why successful women stay trapped in the hustle cycle.

It's not therapy disguised as business coaching. It's business transformation that happens at the identity and nervous system level.

Three phases:
1. EXCAVATE (4 weeks) - Uncover the hidden operating system keeping you stuck
2. INTEGRATE (8 weeks) - Rewire your nervous system for sustainable success  
3. EMBODY (12 weeks) - Apply your new identity to real business decisions

The result? You run a 7-figure business from self-trust, not self-abandonment.

Want to know if this is right for you?

---

#### STEP 7: Discovery Call Offer

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact shows interest in learning more about the program

**Time Delay:** None

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF wants to know more: → Continue to Step 8
> - IF has objections: → Go to Step 22 (Objection handling)
> - IF not interested: → Go to Step 23 (Nurture sequence)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: wants-discovery-call]
**Pipeline Stage:** [Move to: Discovery Call Requested]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Perfect. Here's what I want to do.

I want to jump on a 60-minute call with you where we'll:
- Map out exactly which patterns are keeping you stuck at your current revenue level
- Show you what's really behind the "I can't charge more" story
- Walk through what your business would look like if you operated from self-trust instead of self-abandonment
- Determine if The Sovereign CEO is the right fit for you

No pressure, no hard sell. Just an honest conversation about your business and your life.

The investment for the full program is $18,000 (or 6 payments of $3,200), but first we need to make sure it's right for you.

Sound fair?

If so, what's your email and I'll send you the calendar link.

---

#### STEP 8: Calendar Link Delivery

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact provides email address

**Time Delay:** None

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF email provided: → Continue to Step 9
> - IF hesitation about email: → Go to Step 24 (Address privacy concerns)

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: email-provided] | [+Add: calendar-link-sent]
**Pipeline Stage:** [Move to: Discovery Call Scheduled]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Perfect! I'm sending the calendar link to [EMAIL] right now.

A few things before our call:

1. Block out 60 full minutes - we're going deep
2. Come prepared to be honest about what's really going on in your business
3. Have your revenue numbers handy (I'll ask about your current monthly average)
4. Think about this question: "What would you do if you believed you were already enough?"

That last question changed everything for me. It might do the same for you.

Looking forward to our conversation!

PS - If something comes up and you need to reschedule, just hit reply and let me know. Life happens.

---

#### STEP 9: Pre-Call Reminder (24 hours before)

**Trigger Condition:**
> 24 hours before scheduled discovery call

**Time Delay:** None

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - Always send: → Continue to Step 10

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: pre-call-reminder-sent]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Hey! Quick reminder about our call tomorrow.

I've been thinking about our conversation and I'm excited to dive into what's really keeping you stuck.

One thing I want you to know: I'm not here to convince you of anything. If The Sovereign CEO isn't right for you, I'll be the first to tell you.

But if it IS right... this could be the conversation that changes everything.

See you tomorrow!

---

#### STEP 10: Post-Call Follow-up (No Show)

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact didn't show up for scheduled call

**Time Delay:** 2 hours after missed call

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - Always send: → Continue to Step 11

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: no-show] | [-Remove: discovery-call-scheduled]
**Pipeline Stage:** [Move to: No Show]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Hey, I noticed you missed our call today. No worries - I know things come up.

Here's the thing though... I've been doing this for 7 years and I've noticed a pattern.

The women who reschedule and show up are usually the ones ready for real transformation. The ones who disappear are often still stuck in the "someday" mindset.

Which one are you?

If you're serious about breaking through that revenue ceiling, hit reply and let me know. I'll send you one more calendar link.

If not, no hard feelings. But don't let another year go by wondering "what if."

---

#### STEP 11: Post-Call Follow-up (Showed Up - Interested)

**Trigger Condition:**
> Manual trigger after discovery call for interested prospects

**Time Delay:** None

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - Always send: → Continue to Step 12

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: discovery-call-completed] | [+Add: interested-in-program]
**Pipeline Stage:** [Move to: Discovery Call Completed - Interested]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

It was so good talking with you today. I could hear the exhaustion in your voice when you talked about working weekends again, but I also heard something else...

I heard someone who's ready to stop abandoning herself for her business.

Like I mentioned on the call, The Sovereign CEO isn't for everyone. It requires you to look at some uncomfortable patterns and do the deep work that most people avoid.

But for the women who commit fully? The transformation is incredible.

Take Priya - she went from $180K and burnt out to $420K with half the workload. But more importantly, she stopped feeling guilty about charging what she's worth.

You have 48 hours to decide if you want to join the next cohort. After that, the spots go to the waitlist.

Ready to become The Sovereign CEO?

Hit reply and let me know.

---

#### STEP 12: Urgency Follow-up (24 hours later)

**Trigger Condition:**
> 24 hours after Step 11 with no response

**Time Delay:** None

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - IF no response: → Continue to Step 13
> - IF response received: → Manual handling

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: urgency-follow-up-sent]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Quick question: What's holding you back?

Is it the investment? The time commitment? Fear that it won't work?

I get it. $18,000 feels like a lot. But you're already losing $8,000/month in underpricing alone. Plus all those hours you could be spending with your family instead of trapped in client work.

Here's what I know: You didn't build a successful business by playing it safe. You took risks. You bet on yourself.

This is just another bet on yourself. Except this time, you're not betting on a strategy or a tactic.

You're betting on becoming the woman who runs her business from self-trust instead of self-abandonment.

24 hours left to decide.

What's it going to be?

---

#### STEP 13: Final Follow-up

**Trigger Condition:**
> 24 hours after Step 12 with no response

**Time Delay:** None

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - Always send: → End sequence

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: final-follow-up-sent] | [+Add: not-ready-now]
**Pipeline Stage:** [Move to: Not Ready Now]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

I haven't heard back from you, so I'm assuming The Sovereign CEO isn't the right fit right now.

That's okay. Timing matters.

But I want you to remember something: Every day you stay stuck in the "I can't charge more" story, you're not just losing money. You're losing time with your family. You're losing your health. You're losing pieces of yourself.

The women who work with me don't just make more money. They get their lives back.

If that changes and you want to have another conversation, you know where to find me.

Until then, stop checking Slack at 10pm. Your family needs you present more than your clients need you perfect.

Take care.

---

#### STEP 14: Post-Call Follow-up (Showed Up - Not Interested)

**Trigger Condition:**
> Manual trigger after discovery call for unqualified prospects

**Time Delay:** None

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - Always send: → End sequence

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: discovery-call-completed] | [+Add: not-qualified]
**Pipeline Stage:** [Move to: Not Qualified]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Thanks for the honest conversation today.

Like I mentioned on the call, The Sovereign CEO isn't the right fit for everyone. You're clearly smart and capable, and I have no doubt you'll figure out your next steps.

A few resources that might help:
- Keep taking The Sovereign CEO Audit every few months to track your patterns
- Follow me on Instagram for free content about pricing psychology and boundaries
- Remember: your worth isn't tied to how much you sacrifice

If things change and you find yourself ready for deeper transformation work, you know where to find me.

Wishing you all the best.

---

#### STEP 15: Nurture Sequence (Not Ready for Audit)

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact wasn't interested in audit initially

**Time Delay:** 24 hours

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - Always send: → End sequence

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: nurture-sequence]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

No worries if the audit isn't for you right now.

But can I share something that might help?

The biggest mistake I see successful women make is thinking they need to work harder to break through their revenue ceiling.

But here's the truth: You're not stuck because you're not working hard enough. You're stuck because you're working from the wrong operating system.

Every time you undercharge, overdeliver, or work weekends, you're reinforcing the belief that your value comes from depletion.

The women who break through? They learn to run their businesses from self-trust instead of self-abandonment.

Just something to think about.

---

#### STEP 16: Follow-up (No Response to Q1)

**Trigger Condition:**
> 24 hours after Step 3 with no response

**Time Delay:** None

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - Always send: → End sequence

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: no-response-q1]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

I know you're busy (probably answering client emails at 10pm like most of my clients used to do).

But here's a quick reality check: If you're too busy to spend 2 minutes answering a question about your biggest business frustration, that's exactly the problem we need to solve.

The Sovereign CEO Audit is still waiting for you: https://unboundleadership.co/audit

It takes 8 minutes and shows you exactly which patterns are keeping you trapped in the hustle cycle.

Your future self will thank you.

---

#### STEP 17: Follow-up (No Response to Q2)

**Trigger Condition:**
> 12 hours after Step 4 with no response

**Time Delay:** None

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - Always send: → End sequence

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: no-response-q2]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Let me guess - you saw my question about investment and got scared off?

Listen, I get it. $18,000 feels like a lot when you're used to undercharging for everything.

But here's what I want you to consider: You're already investing. You're investing your time, your energy, your health, and your relationships into a business model that's slowly killing you.

The only question is whether you want to keep making that investment... or invest in something that actually gives you your life back.

Think about it.

---

#### STEP 18: Nurture/Education (Still Researching)

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact indicated still in research mode

**Time Delay:** None

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - Always send: → End sequence

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: still-researching]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

I respect that you're taking time to research. Smart women don't make impulsive decisions.

But here's what 7 years of coaching has taught me: The women who "research" for months usually aren't researching the solution. They're researching ways to avoid the real work.

The real work isn't learning another strategy. It's facing the uncomfortable truth about why you're undercharging in the first place.

When you're ready to stop researching and start transforming, you know where to find me.

The Sovereign CEO Audit is still here when you're ready: https://unboundleadership.co/audit

---

#### STEP 19: Price Objection Handling

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact objects to price/investment level

**Time Delay:** None

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - Always send: → End sequence

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: price-objection]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

I hear you saying you can't afford $18,000.

But can you afford to keep losing $8,000/month in underpricing? Can you afford another year of working 70-hour weeks? Can you afford to keep snapping at your kids because you're stressed about client emails?

Here's the math: Priya was losing way more than $18,000 per year by undercharging. The program paid for itself 13 times over in her first year.

But this isn't really about money, is it? It's about whether you believe you're worth investing in.

And until you believe that... no amount of strategy will save you.

Something to think about.

---

#### STEP 20: Address Hesitation

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact shows hesitation about inner work/transformation

**Time Delay:** None

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - Always send: → Continue to Step 7

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: hesitation-addressed]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

I can feel the hesitation. Let me guess what you're thinking:

"This sounds too woo-woo" or "I need tactics, not therapy" or "I don't have time for inner work."

I used to think the same thing. I was making $400K in consulting but working 70-hour weeks and drinking wine to sleep. I thought I just needed better systems.

But here's what I learned: You can optimize your funnels all day long, but if your nervous system is running from "I have to prove I'm worthy," you'll sabotage every strategy you try.

This isn't therapy disguised as business coaching. This is business transformation that happens where transformation actually occurs - at the identity and nervous system level.

Still with me?

---

#### STEP 21: Follow-up (No Response to Program Intro)

**Trigger Condition:**
> 24 hours after Step 6 with no response

**Time Delay:** None

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - Always send: → End sequence

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: no-response-program-intro]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

Silence usually means one of two things:

1. You're not ready to face the real reasons you're stuck
2. You're scared it might actually work

Both are normal. Change is terrifying, especially when you've built your identity around being the woman who sacrifices everything for success.

But here's what I know: You didn't reach out because you're happy with where you are. You reached out because something inside you knows there's a better way.

Trust that voice.

The Sovereign CEO program starts next month. There are 3 spots left.

Ready to stop being The Half-Price Hustler?

---

#### STEP 22: Objection Handling (General)

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact raises objections about the program

**Time Delay:** None

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - Always send: → Continue to Step 7

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: objection-raised]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

What's the real objection here?

Because in 7 years of doing this work, I've learned that objections are rarely about what they seem to be about.

"I don't have time" usually means "I'm scared to slow down because I think everything will fall apart."

"It's too expensive" usually means "I don't believe I'm worth investing in."

"I need to think about it" usually means "I'm terrified this might actually work and then I'll have to take responsibility for my life."

Which one is it for you?

---

#### STEP 23: Nurture Sequence (Not Interested)

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact indicates not interested in discovery call

**Time Delay:** None

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - Always send: → End sequence

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: not-interested-call]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

No problem. I'm not here to convince anyone.

But let me leave you with this: The definition of insanity is doing the same thing over and over and expecting different results.

If you keep doing what you're doing, you'll keep getting what you're getting.

More 70-hour weeks. More undercharging. More resentment. More checking Slack at 10pm while your family wonders where you went.

When you're ready for a different result, you know where to find me.

---

#### STEP 24: Address Privacy Concerns

**Trigger Condition:**
> Contact hesitates to provide email address

**Time Delay:** None

**Condition Check (If/Then):**
> - Always send: → Continue to Step 8

**Tags to Apply:** [+Add: privacy-concern-addressed]

**Message Content (copy-paste ready):**

I get it. Your inbox is probably already a disaster zone.

I'm not going to spam you with daily emails about "crushing it" and "10X-ing your mindset." That's not my style.

I'll send you the calendar link and maybe one follow-up if we don't connect. That's it.

Your email stays between us. I'm not selling it to anyone or adding you to some massive list.

Sound fair?

---

business-abstract.content:
# MANYCHAT AUTOMATION FLOW
## Sarah Chen | Unbound Leadership | The Sovereign CEO

---

## FLOW 1: DM KEYWORD TRIGGER + WELCOME/QUALIFICATION

---
#### NODE: Keyword Trigger Response
- **Trigger:** DM keyword "SOVEREIGN" or comment "SOVEREIGN" on post
- **Delay:** Instant
- **Tags:** [+Add DM-Lead]
- **Custom Fields:** lead_source = dm-keyword

**Message:**
> Hey! So glad you reached out about The Sovereign CEO.
>

business-abstract.content:
# FACEBOOK CONTENT PLAYBOOK: UNBOUND LEADERSHIP
## 15 High-Converting Posts for Female Founder Transformation

---

## POST 1: VALUE POST (TOF)
**Post Type:** Value | **Funnel Stage:** TOF | **Retargeting:** Y - Warm audience interested in pricing psychology

Your pricing conversations reveal everything about your nervous system state.

When you're regulated:
→ You present prices with calm confidence
→ You handle objections without getting defensive  
→ You can sit in the silence after stating your rate
→ You feel grounded in your value

When you're dysregulated:
→ You rush through pricing and immediately offer discounts
→ You over-explain and justify every dollar
→ You take "I need to think about it" personally
→ You feel guilty for even asking

Here's the thing most coaches won't tell you: You can't fake nervous system regulation. Your clients feel your energy before they hear your words.

The fastest way to increase your prices? Start with 10 minutes of somatic practice before every sales conversation.

Try this today: Before your next client call, take 5 deep belly breaths and remind yourself "I am inherently valuable."

What do you notice about your energy in pricing conversations?

---

## POST 2: STORY POST (MOF)
**Post Type:** Story | **Funnel Stage:** MOF | **Retargeting:** Y - Engaged audience, female founders

At 33, I was making $400K in my consulting business.

From the outside, I looked successful. Nice revenue, growing client base, featured on podcasts.

But behind the scenes? I was working 70-hour weeks, drinking wine to fall asleep, and silently resenting every client who asked for "just one more revision."

I had built a business that was slowly killing me.

The breaking point came during a therapy session. My therapist asked me a simple question:

"What would you do if you believed you were already enough?"

I sat there in complete silence. I had no answer. And that terrified me.

That question shattered everything I thought I knew about success. I realized I had been abandoning myself to serve everyone else, thinking that's what "good entrepreneurs" do.

It took 2 years of deep inner work to rebuild my relationship with worthiness. Getting ICF-certified in 2021. Learning IFS and somatic practices. 

When I launched my coaching business in 2022, everything was different. I wasn't hustling from depletion anymore. I was leading from fullness.

The revenue stayed strong, but I got my life back.

If you're reading this and thinking "that was me," you're not alone. And you don't have to stay there.

---

## POST 3: BELIEF-SHIFTING POST (MOF)
**Post Type:** Belief-Shifting | **Funnel Stage:** MOF | **Retargeting:** Y - Audience interested in business strategy content

Here's the uncomfortable truth most female founders don't want to hear:

You don't have a marketing problem. You have a self-worth problem disguised as a marketing problem.

Think about it:

→ You know exactly what to post but freeze when it's time to hit publish
→ You have a proven offer but feel guilty charging what it's worth  
→ You understand sales funnels but can't bring yourself to follow up consistently
→ You've read every business book but still feel like you're not "ready"

This isn't about needing better strategies. You already know what to do.

This is about the part of you that doesn't believe you deserve the success you're creating.

It's like trying to plant a garden in contaminated soil. You can have the best seeds and perfect fertilizer, but if the soil is toxic, nothing grows properly.

Your internal operating system IS the soil. And until you address what's happening at the root level, every strategy will feel forced and unsustainable.

The real work isn't learning more tactics. It's excavating the patterns that make you sabotage your own success.

When you address the root, the surface problems solve themselves.

What patterns do you notice in your own business decisions?

---

## POST 4: RESULTS/PROOF POST (BOF)
**Post Type:** Results/Proof | **Funnel Stage:** BOF | **Retargeting:** Y - High-intent audience considering coaching

Priya was stuck at $180K for 2 years.

She was burnt out, charging half of what her competitors charged, and working endless hours just to keep up.

She'd tried everything:
→ Multiple masterminds
→ Every business book she could find  
→ Working with various business coaches who told her to "just charge more"

But she still felt guilty every time she thought about raising her prices.

Then she joined The Sovereign CEO program.

Month 1: We identified the part of her that believed charging premium prices made her "greedy"

Month 3: She tripled her prices using nervous system regulation and parts work

Month 7: She hit $420K annually while cutting her workload in half

As Priya said: "I finally stopped feeling guilty for charging what I'm worth."

The difference? We didn't give her pricing scripts. We addressed the root pattern that was keeping her stuck.

When you change your internal operating system, your external results follow.

That's the power of doing the real work.

---

## POST 5: CTA POST (BOF)
**Post Type:** CTA | **Funnel Stage:** BOF | **Retargeting:** N - Organic reach only

There are two types of female founders:

**The Half-Price Hustler:** Makes good money on paper but works 70-hour weeks. Charges half what competitors charge because deep down, she doesn't believe she's worth more. Success feels like a prison she built herself.

**The Sovereign CEO:** Runs her business from self-trust instead of self-abandonment. Days feel spacious even while making more money in fewer hours. Charges premium prices without guilt and makes decisions from inner wisdom.

Which one are you becoming?

If you're tired of being The Half-Price Hustler and ready to become The Sovereign CEO, I can help.

The Sovereign CEO is my 6-month program for female founders making $150K-$500K who are ready to do the inner work that creates sustainable transformation.

This is for you if:
→ You're making good money but feel trapped by your own success
→ You're ready to address root patterns, not just symptoms
→ You're willing to do nervous system work and parts integration
→ You want to run a business from alignment, not exhaustion

This is NOT for you if you want quick fixes or aren't ready to look at your patterns honestly.

DM me "SOVEREIGN" if you want the details.

---

## POST 6: VALUE POST (TOF)
**Post Type:** Value | **Funnel Stage:** TOF | **Retargeting:** Y - Audience interested in leadership content

The fastest way to identify your leadership operating system:

Notice what happens in your body when a client pushes back on your boundaries.

**Sovereign CEO response:**
→ Stays calm and grounded
→ Restates the boundary with compassion
→ Doesn't take it personally
→ Feels confident in her decision

**Half-Price Hustler response:**
→ Immediately feels guilty and anxious
→ Starts negotiating with herself
→ Takes the pushback as evidence she's "too much"
→ Caves to keep the peace

Your nervous system reveals your true leadership capacity.

You can't fake regulation. Your clients feel whether you're operating from self-trust or self-abandonment.

The good news? Nervous system capacity can be built. It's a skill, not a personality trait.

Try this: Next time someone pushes back, take 3 deep breaths before responding. Notice the difference in your energy and their response.

How does your body respond to boundary pushback?

---

## POST 7: STORY POST (MOF)
**Post Type:** Story | **Funnel Stage:** MOF | **Retargeting:** Y - Engaged audience

I used to think 10pm Slack notifications were a badge of honor.

"Look how dedicated I am. Look how much my clients need me."

I told myself I was being "responsive" and "client-focused."

Really? I was terrified of what would happen if I wasn't constantly available.

The 47 unread messages at 10pm weren't proof of my success. They were proof of my inability to create boundaries.

I was confusing being needed with being valuable.

The shift happened when I realized: If my business can't run without me checking messages at 10pm, I don't have a business. I have an expensive job.

Now my phone goes on airplane mode at 8pm. My clients respect this boundary because I respect it first.

The quality of my work improved. My family got the best version of me instead of the leftovers.

And my revenue? It went up. Because I started making decisions from clarity instead of reactivity.

Boundaries aren't walls. They're the foundation for sustainable success.

What boundary do you need to set today?

---

## POST 8: BELIEF-SHIFTING POST (MOF)
**Post Type:** Belief-Shifting | **Funnel Stage:** MOF | **Retargeting:** Y - Audience interested in time management/productivity

Here's what no one tells you about "time management":

You don't have a time problem. You have a nervous system problem.

When you're dysregulated:
→ Everything feels urgent
→ You can't prioritize effectively  
→ You say yes to things that don't matter
→ You work harder, not smarter

When you're regulated:
→ You can discern what actually needs attention
→ You make decisions quickly and confidently
→ You protect your energy like the finite resource it is
→ You work from strategy, not reactivity

A dysregulated nervous system will sabotage the best time management system in the world.

It's like trying to drive with your emergency brake on. You can press the gas harder, but you're not going to get optimal performance.

This is why all the productivity hacks and time blocking systems haven't worked for you.

Start with nervous system regulation. Everything else becomes easier.

20 minutes of morning somatic practice will save you hours of scattered effort later.

What happens when you try to be productive while feeling anxious?

---

## POST 9: RESULTS/PROOF POST (BOF)
**Post Type:** Results/Proof | **Funnel Stage:** BOF | **Retargeting:** Y - High-intent audience

The numbers that matter:

Out of my last 40 clients in The Sovereign CEO program, 28 achieved breakthrough results.

That's a 70% success rate.

But here's what's even more important: the first meaningful shifts show up by week 4.

Clients report their first real "permission to slow down" moment - usually a full day off without guilt.

This isn't about willpower or discipline. This is about addressing the root patterns that keep you trapped in the hustle cycle.

When you change your internal operating system, your external results follow naturally.

Week 4: First guilt-free day off
Month 3: Noticeable nervous system shifts  
Month 6: Business running from self-trust instead of self-abandonment

The transformation is predictable when you do the real work.

7 years coaching, 180 clients total, ICF-certified - but my real credential is that I've walked this exact path myself.

What would your life look like if you gave yourself permission to slow down?

---

## POST 10: POLARIZING/FILTER POST (MOF)
**Post Type:** Polarizing/Filter | **Funnel Stage:** MOF | **Retargeting:** N - Organic reach only

Unpopular opinion: If you're not willing to do inner work, you don't actually want to change.

You want your circumstances to change while you stay exactly the same.

You want:
→ Higher revenue without examining your money patterns
→ Better boundaries without addressing why you people-please
→ Premium pricing without looking at your worth programming
→ Sustainable success without changing your relationship with productivity

That's not transformation. That's magical thinking.

Real change requires looking at the parts of yourself you'd rather ignore. It means feeling uncomfortable while new patterns integrate.

It means admitting that your current operating system - the one that got you this far - might be the thing keeping you stuck.

If you're looking for someone to give you tactics without addressing your patterns, I'm not your coach.

If you want quick fixes and surface-level strategies, please unfollow me now.

But if you're ready to do the real work - the uncomfortable, necessary, life-changing work - then we should talk.

The Sovereign CEO program isn't for everyone. And that's exactly the point.

Are you ready for real transformation, or just hoping for easier circumstances?

---

## POST 11: VALUE POST (TOF)
**Post Type:** Value | **Funnel Stage:** TOF | **Retargeting:** Y - Audience interested in pricing/money mindset

Your relationship with money is running your business decisions.

Notice:
→ How you feel when you state your prices
→ Whether you offer discounts before anyone asks
→ If you justify your rates with lengthy explanations
→ How quickly you cave when someone says "it's too expensive"

Money triggers reveal everything about your internal programming.

If you feel guilty charging premium prices, your clients feel that guilt. Energy is contagious.

If you believe deep down that you're "too expensive," you'll unconsciously sabotage your sales conversations.

If you think money is scarce, you'll make desperate decisions that repel abundance.

Here's the shift: Your prices aren't about what you need. They're about the value you create.

When you charge what you're worth, you attract clients who value transformation. When you undercharge, you attract clients who value discounts.

Which energy do you want to work with?

Try this: Before your next pricing conversation, remind yourself "I create tremendous value" instead of "I hope they can afford this."

What shifts when you think about value instead of cost?

---

## POST 12: CTA POST (BOF)
**Post Type:** CTA | **Funnel Stage:** BOF | **Retargeting:** N - Organic reach only

Every month you stay stuck costs you approximately $8,000 in underpricing alone.

Plus 15-20 hours per week trapped in client work that should be delegated.

Plus the relationship strain from working weekends.

Plus the health cost of chronic stress and poor boundaries.

How many more months can you afford to wait?

The Sovereign CEO program addresses the root patterns keeping you stuck at the identity and nervous system level.

6 months. Weekly 1-on-1 calls. Monthly group sessions. Voxer access. Private Circle community. Quarterly retreats.

Investment: $18,000 or 6 payments of $3,200.

60-day guarantee if you don't feel a meaningful shift.

This is for female founders making $150K-$500K who are:
→ Tired of working 70-hour weeks
→ Ready to charge what they're worth without guilt
→ Committed to doing inner work for sustainable change

This is NOT for you if you want tactics without transformation.

The cost of staying stuck exceeds the investment in change.

DM me "READY" if you want to become The Sovereign CEO.

---

## POST 13: STORY POST (MOF)
**Post Type:** Story | **Funnel Stage:** MOF | **Retargeting:** Y - Engaged audience

The question that changed everything:

"What would you do if you believed you were already enough?"

I sat in my therapist's office, successful on paper but dying inside.

$400K revenue. 70-hour weeks. Wine to sleep. Resentment toward every client revision.

I had no answer to her question. And that terrified me.

I realized I had never operated from a place of enoughness. Everything I did was to prove my worth, not express it.

Every late night was evidence I was "dedicated."
Every client demand I accepted was proof I was "helpful."
Every boundary I didn't set showed I was "flexible."

But really? I was abandoning myself to serve everyone else.

That question launched 2 years of deep inner work. IFS training. Somatic practices. Learning to lead from self-trust instead of self-abandonment.

When I launched my coaching business in 2022, I operated from a completely different place.

Not proving my worth. Expressing it.

The business felt aligned instead of draining. Clients respected my boundaries because I respected them first.

Same skills. Same expertise. Completely different operating system.

What would YOU do if you believed you were already enough?

---

## POST 14: BELIEF-SHIFTING POST (MOF)
**Post Type:** Belief-Shifting | **Funnel Stage:** MOF | **Retargeting:** Y - Audience interested in coaching/personal development

Most female founders think they need another strategy.

What they actually need is nervous system capacity to implement the strategies they already know.

You have the knowledge. You've read the books, taken the courses, joined the masterminds.

But when it's time to implement, something stops you:
→ You freeze when it's time to hit "publish" on that post
→ You feel sick before sales calls
→ You cave on boundaries the moment someone pushes back
→ You second-guess every decision

That's not a strategy problem. That's a nervous system problem.

Your body is operating from old programming that says "visibility is dangerous" and "conflict means rejection."

No amount of marketing tactics will override a nervous system that's in survival mode.

This is why The Sovereignty Stack starts with nervous system regulation, then adds business strategy.

You can't build sustainable success on a dysregulated foundation.

When you regulate your nervous system first, implementation becomes natural instead of forced.

What strategies do you know but struggle to implement consistently?

---

## POST 15: RESULTS/PROOF POST (BOF)
**Post Type:** Results/Proof | **Funnel Stage:** BOF | **Retargeting:** Y - High-intent audience considering coaching

From "I can't take a day off" to "My business runs during my month-long vacation."

That's the Sovereign CEO transformation.

Month 1: Excavate the hidden operating system
→ Identify the parts driving your people-pleasing
→ Map your nervous system patterns
→ Create your personalized transformation roadmap

Month 3: Integrate new nervous system responses  
→ Practice somatic regulation daily
→ Learn IFS self-leadership
→ Build capacity for difficult conversations

Month 6: Embody your new identity in real business decisions
→ Charge premium prices without guilt
→ Set boundaries that clients respect
→ Make decisions from inner wisdom instead of external pressure

The result? You run a business from self-trust instead of self-abandonment.

Your days feel spacious. Your family gets the best version of you. Your success supports your life instead of consuming it.

This is what's possible when you address the root patterns instead of just treating symptoms.

Ready to become The Sovereign CEO?

---

*Each post is designed to systematically move prospects through the funnel while building trust, challenging limiting beliefs, and creating desire for The Sovereign CEO transformation. Mix and match based on your content calendar needs.*

# Facebook/Instagram Ad Copy for Sarah Chen - Unbound Leadership

## Ad 1: Problem Agitation (Cold Audience)

**Primary Text (Short):**
Making $300K+ but working 70-hour weeks? The "hustle harder" playbook is broken. Here's why female founders are burning out at record rates.

**Primary Text (Long):**
Making $300K+ but working 70-hour weeks? The "hustle harder" playbook is broken. Here's why female founders are burning out at record rates.

You guys, I need to tell you something uncomfortable: achievement doesn't equal worthiness, but nobody told us that when we started our businesses.

I see it every day — brilliant women running $150K-$500K businesses who can't take a day off without guilt. Who snap at their kids because of a client email. Who drink wine to fall asleep because their minds won't stop racing.

The real problem? You're running your business from self-abandonment instead of self-trust.

I was there too. At 33, I had a $400K consulting business and was working 70-hour weeks, drinking to sleep, silently resenting every client who asked for another revision.

My therapist asked me: "What would you do if you believed you were already enough?"

I didn't have an answer. That terrified me.

Here's what I discovered after 2 years of deep inner work: The strategies you're using work at the behavior layer, but the problem is identity and nervous system.

You can't hustle your way out of patterns rooted in "I'm only worthy if I'm productive."

The Sovereign CEO Audit reveals the hidden operating system keeping you trapped below your potential. Take it now — it's free.

**Headline:** Stop the hustle cycle

**Description:** Free audit reveals why

**CTA Button:** Learn More

**Suggested Image/Video Direction:** Split-screen image: Left side shows a woman at laptop at 11pm looking exhausted, right side shows the same woman confidently closing laptop at 5pm

**Targeting Notes:**
- Audience: Cold (female entrepreneurs, business owners, consultants age 30-45)
- Optimization: Landing page views
- Budget: [COACH: Insert your real dollar amount here]-100/day

---

## Ad 2: Social Proof Case Study (Warm Audience)

**Primary Text (Short):**
"I tripled my prices and dropped 70% of my clients. Now I make $420K with half the workload." — Priya R., marketing agency owner

**Primary Text (Long):**
"I tripled my prices and dropped 70% of my clients. Now I make $420K with half the workload." — Priya R., marketing agency owner

Listen, this is what happens when you stop running your business from self-abandonment.

Priya came to me making $180K, burnt out, charging half of what her competitors charged. Sound familiar?

She was trapped in the same pattern I see with every female founder: believing her worth was tied to how hard she worked, how available she was, how much she could handle.

After 6 months in The Sovereign CEO program, everything changed:
→ Tripled her prices without losing sleep
→ Dropped 70% of clients (kept only the best ones)
→ Now making $420K/year with half the workload
→ Takes full weekends off without guilt

"I finally stopped feeling guilty for charging what I'm worth," she told me.

Here's what shifted: Priya learned to run her business from self-trust instead of self-abandonment. She discovered what I call The Sovereignty Stack — the three-layer integration that transforms how you show up as a CEO.

The Sovereign CEO program opens again soon. If you're ready to stop being trapped by your own success, take The Sovereign CEO Audit first. It reveals exactly where you're stuck.

**Headline:** From burnout to $420K

**Description:** See the transformation

**CTA Button:** Learn More

**Suggested Image/Video Direction:** Before/after style graphic showing business metrics: "$180K, 70hr weeks" vs "$420K, 35hr weeks"

**Targeting Notes:**
- Audience: Warm (website visitors, email subscribers)
- Optimization: Landing page views
- Budget: $30-50/day

---

## Ad 3: Lead Magnet (Cold Audience)

**Primary Text (Short):**
The Sovereign CEO Audit: Discover the hidden patterns keeping you trapped below 7-figures (even if you're already successful).

**Primary Text (Long):**
The Sovereign CEO Audit: Discover the hidden patterns keeping you trapped below 7-figures (even if you're already successful).

You guys, here's the uncomfortable truth: if you're making $150K-$500K but working 70-hour weeks, the problem isn't your strategy.

It's your operating system.

Most female founders are running businesses from what I call "self-abandonment mode":
→ Charging half of what competitors charge
→ Available 24/7 to clients
→ Guilt when they're not working
→ Resentment building under the surface

The Sovereign CEO Audit reveals exactly where you're stuck and gives you a clear path forward.

In 10 minutes, you'll discover:
✓ Your current "CEO operating system" (and why it's keeping you small)
✓ The specific pattern sabotaging your pricing
✓ Where you're leaking energy in your business
✓ Your next step to break the cycle

I've used this framework with 180 clients. The women who take action on their results? They typically see their first "permission to slow down" moment by week 4.

Take the audit now — it's completely free.

**Headline:** Free CEO audit

**Description:** Discover what's keeping you stuck

**CTA Button:** Sign Up

**Suggested Image/Video Direction:** Clean, professional graphic showing a laptop with "CEO Audit" on screen, surrounded by coffee cup and notebook

**Targeting Notes:**
- Audience: Cold (lookalike of email list, interests in female entrepreneurship)
- Optimization: Landing page views
- Budget: [COACH: Insert your real dollar amount here]-150/day

---

## Ad 4: Belief-Shift Content (Retargeting - No CTA)

**Primary Text (Short):**
"I just need to be more disciplined." — Every female founder who's actually dealing with a nervous system problem, not a discipline problem.

**Primary Text (Long):**
"I just need to be more disciplined." — Every female founder who's actually dealing with a nervous system problem, not a discipline problem.

You guys, I need to call bullshit on something.

The story you're telling yourself — that you just need to be more disciplined, more organized, more consistent — is keeping you trapped.

Here's what's really happening: Your nervous system learned that achievement equals safety. So now, every time you try to slow down, every time you try to charge more, every time you try to set boundaries, your system goes into panic mode.

It's not a discipline problem. It's a nervous system problem.

Think about it: You can plan the perfect morning routine, but if your nervous system associates "not working" with "not being worthy," you'll sabotage it every time.

You can set boundaries with clients, but if your system believes "saying no means I'm selfish," you'll cave within 48 hours.

This is why behavior-change strategies don't stick for high-achieving women. You're trying to solve a nervous system problem with a mindset solution.

The real work? Teaching your nervous system that you're already enough. That your worth isn't tied to your productivity. That slowing down is actually the path to scaling up.

When you get this right, everything changes. Pricing becomes easy. Boundaries become natural. Taking time off becomes guilt-free.

Your nervous system is not broken. It's just operating from old programming that no longer serves you.

**Headline:** [No headline - content-only post]

**Description:** [No description - content-only post]

**Targeting Notes:**
- Audience: Retargeting (website visitors, video viewers, engaged users)
- Optimization: Post engagement / Video views
- Budget: $20-40/day

---

## Ad 5: Direct Offer (Warm Audience Only)

**Primary Text (Short):**
Ready to become The Sovereign CEO? Applications now open for the 6-month transformation that takes you from self-abandonment to self-trust.

**Primary Text (Long):**
Ready to become The Sovereign CEO? Applications now open for the 6-month transformation that takes you from self-abandonment to self-trust.

Listen, if you're making $150K-$500K but feel trapped by your own success, this is for you.

The Sovereign CEO program is designed for one type of woman: the high-achieving founder who's ready to stop running her business from burnout and start leading from fullness.

This is what we do together over 6 months:

**Excavate (Weeks 1-4):** Uncover the hidden operating system keeping you stuck. You'll get clarity on the root patterns sabotaging your pricing, boundaries, and peace of mind.

**Integrate (Weeks 5-12):** Deep somatic and Internal Family Systems work to rewire your nervous system. You'll develop a new default state that feels spacious, grounded, and self-trusting.

**Embody (Weeks 13-24):** Apply everything to real business decisions. You'll have lived evidence of your new identity as a Sovereign CEO.

What's included:
→ Weekly 1-on-1 sessions with me
→ Monthly group calls with other Sovereign CEOs
→ Voxer access between sessions
→ Private Circle community
→ Quarterly retreats

Investment: $18,000 for 6 months (or 6 monthly payments of $3,200)

This is for women who are done with the hustle playbook and ready to build a 7-figure business from self-trust instead of self-abandonment.

If that's you, apply now. I work with 20 clients at a time, and we start in [COACH: Insert your real timeframe here].

**CTA Button:** Apply Now
